source: 500 AlI Time Greatest Rock Albums , number 462 ; Rites of Man , Tom Paine and Commonsense . This fusion of hard rock , blues , and off-the-wall mysticism rocked to 6 on the Billboard chart , where it stayed for seven weeks in 1972 . Songs " Sunrise Blues " and " The Vampire 's Wife " reached 8 and 13 respectively on the singles chart that year . Singer/songwriter Paine never equaled this success , but the band continued until 1974 . Their triumphant concert finale is considered one of the most dramatic shows of the decade and paved the way for acts like Kiss and Ozzy Osborne . Paine died in 1976 of a drug overdose .
domestication: 500张有史以来最伟大的摇滚专辑中排名第462位的《仪式与理性》，就是Tom Paine和他的乐队Commonsense的杰作。这种硬摇滚、蓝调音乐和另类神秘主义的大融合，在1972年冲上了Billboard排行榜的第6位，并在那里驻足了七周。当年，他们的单曲《日出ブルース》和《吸血鬼的妻子》分别登上了排行榜的第8位和第13位。主唱兼词曲作者汤姆·佩恩再也没有超越过这份成功，但他的乐队还是坚持到了1974年。他们的告别演唱会堪称十年来最戏剧化的演出，为Kiss和奥兹zy·奥斯本这样的乐队铺平了道路。可惜，汤姆·佩恩在1976年因吸毒过量去世了，留下了一段令人感叹的音乐传奇。
foreignization: 500 All Time Greatest Rock Albums ，第462位；《成年礼》，汤姆·潘恩和平常心。这融合了硬摇滚、蓝调和离经叛道的神秘主义的融合，冲进了公告牌排行榜的第6位，并且在1972年在那里停留了七个星期。歌曲《日出布鲁斯》和《吸血鬼之妻》分别登上了当年的单曲榜第8位和第13位。歌手/词曲作者汤姆·潘恩再也没有达到过这样的成功，但是乐队一直持续到1974年。他们胜利的演唱会最后一场被认为是十年中最戏剧性的表演之一，为Kiss和奥齐·奥斯本等艺人铺平了道路。汤姆·潘恩于1976年死于吸毒过量。

source: Guiseppi Scapellini Assistant Professor , Contemporary Music History , San Francisco State University ) : In the terms of the youth culture of the day , vampires symbolized either the older generation , attempting to suck the life of rebellious youth , or controlling women . Tom Paine took the metaphor and ran with it .
domestication: 加州大学旧金山分校的当代音乐历史助理教授Giuseppi Scapellini认为：在当时的青年文化背景下，吸血鬼代表了两个群体，一是企图扼杀年轻人叛逆精神的老一辈人，二是控制欲望过强的女性。托姆·佩恩将这个隐喻发挥得淋漓尽致。
foreignization: Guiseppi Scapellini （旧金山州立大学当代音乐史助理教授） ：在当天的青年文化中，吸血鬼代表了两种可能性：要么是年长的一代，试图从反叛的年轻人身上吸取生命力，要么是控制欲强的女性。汤姆·潘恩接受了这种隐喻，并将其发展开来。

source: Guiseppi Scapellini : If you simply look at the way a person plays guitar , it says a lot about him , and the image he wishes to project . The old bands - the surfers , the British invasion - they held their guitar here , in front of their chests . It gives good control over the instrument and it also makes them seem almost cute , like they 're cuddling something they cherish .
domestication: 吉塞皮·斯卡佩利尼：光看一个人弹吉他的样子，就能透露出很多关于他的信息，以及他希望展现出的形象。你看那些老牌乐队，比如冲浪摇滚和英伦入侵乐队的主唱们，他们都喜欢把吉他抱在胸前。这不仅可以让他们更好地控制乐器，还会让他们显得很有亲和力，就像在拥抱珍贵的东西一样。他们这种姿势其实也挺讨人喜欢的。
foreignization: Giuseppi Scapellini：如果你简单地看一个人弹吉他的方式，它会告诉你很多关于他的事情，以及他希望呈现的形象。老乐队 -衝浪者，英国入侵者- 他们拿着吉他放在这里，在他们的胸前。这给乐器提供了良好的控制，并且也使他们看起来几乎很可爱，就像他们拥抱他们珍视的东西一样。

source: Concert at Peoples ' Park , Berkeley , 1969 : Five earnest looking boys in colonial garb , playing folk rock . Tom Paine and Johnny Goldberg , wearing tricorner hats over powdered hair , play electric guitar . Covers of Dylan , Ritchie Havens , Country Joe and the Fish , and a final almost inspired rock version of " We Shall Overcome . "
domestication: 1969年在伯克利的人民公园举行了一场音乐会，一群认真的年轻人身穿古装，演奏着民谣摇滚乐。汤姆·佩恩和约翰尼·戈德堡戴着三角帽，披着粉末头发，弹着电吉他。他们演奏了鲍勃·迪伦、里奇·哈文斯、乡村乔和他的鱼等人的歌曲，最终以一首几乎是即兴创作的《我们必将胜利》的摇滚版结束了演出。整个过程中，他们的激情澎湃，充满活力，就像是在为自由和理想而战一样。
foreignization: 1969年在伯克利市的人民公园举行的音乐会：五个穿着殖民地风格服装、表情严肃的男孩演奏民谣摇滚乐。汤姆·潘恩和约翰尼·戈德堡戴着三角帽，头发上撒有粉末，弹奏电吉他。他们演奏了鲍勃·迪伦、里奇·海文斯、乡村乔和鱼乐队以及最后一个几乎令人鼓舞的摇滚版的“我们必将胜利”的歌曲。

source: We were in this band where we took revolutionary names . I was Johnny Tremayne , because I was a physics major and did n't know a lot of history , but I remembered the movie . We did the Sons of Liberty song . The Disney lawyers learned of it , and took out an injunction . But no one had actually heard of us , we were totally obscure except on campus , so I 'm told they sued Paul Revere and the Raiders . They were the band that played for Dick Clark on Shindig . They wore costumes too , and were probably dumbfounded when the Disney machine went after them . Or this may have just been one of Andy 's paranoid raps . Memory , you know ?
domestication: 我们那时候在一个乐队里，每个人都起了些革命性的名字。我就叫Johnny Tremayne，因为我是学物理的，历史知识不多，但我记得有一部电影，于是就用了这个名字。我们还演奏过《自由之子》的歌曲。迪士尼公司的律师知道这件事后，向我们发出了一份禁令。但是，当时我们乐队基本上没什么名气，只有校园里的人知道我们，所以我听说他们把诉状送到了保罗·里维尔和突击队（Paul Revere & the Raiders）乐队那里。他们是给迪克·克拉克（Dick Clark）的音乐节目Shindig伴奏的乐队，他们也穿着戏服，可能当迪士尼公司的官司打来的时候，他们很纳闷。这也许只是安迪的一个妄想的胡言乱语，谁知道呢？记忆总是这么回事……
foreignization: 我们当时在一个乐队里，取了革命性的名字。我叫Johnny Tremayne，因为我是物理专业，历史知识不多，但我记得那部电影。我们演奏过《自由之子》的歌曲。迪士尼的律师们知道了这件事，并发出了一份禁令。但是没有人真正听说过我们，我们除了在校园内完全默默无闻，所以我被告知他们起诉了保罗·里维尔和突袭者乐队。他们是为迪克·克拉克的摇摆舞会演奏的乐队。他们也穿着服装，可能当迪士尼机器攻击他们时他们感到困惑。或者这可能只是安迪的偏执演讲中的一部分。记忆，你知道？

We were in this band where we took revolutionary names . I was Johnny Tremayne , because I was a physics major and did n't know a lot of history , but I remembered the movie . We did the Sons of Liberty song . The Disney lawyers learned of it , and took out an injunction . But no one had actually heard of us , we were totally obscure except on campus , so I 'm told they sued Paul Revere and the Raiders . They were the band that played for Dick Clark on Shindig . They wore costumes too , and were probably dumbfounded when the Disney machine went after them . Or this may have just been one of Andy 's paranoid raps . Memory , you know ?

source: Andy Shipp : They were gods to me . See , I was a music major and I had no talent whatsoever . I knew all this history and theory and I could babble criticism with the A students , but I was entirely uncreative . And here 's Tommy , this guy who 's a philosophy major , and he 's got this ability to sing and write and marry chords that never had even shaken hands before .
domestication: 安迪·希普说：他们在我眼里就像神一样。我当时主修音乐，但根本没有任何天赋。我了解所有的历史和理论，可以和A学生一起喋喋不休地批评音乐，但我完全没有创造力。而汤米这个哲学专业的学生，却具有唱歌、作曲的能力，他可以让那些从未接触过的和弦融合在一起，实在是太厉害了。
foreignization: 安迪·希普：他们在我看来都是神。看，我当时主修音乐，但是我没有丝毫的天赋。我知道所有这些历史和理论，并且我可以和A学生一起胡乱说些批评的话，但我完全没有创造力。而汤米，这个哲学专业的学生，他却有唱歌、写歌和演奏从未相遇过的和弦的能力。

source: Hippies and weekend hippies at the table . Band barely seen through the smoke and old videotape . Tom Paine on lead , Johnny Goldberg on rhythm , both in denim pants and jackets , long hair , Goldberg with an almost rabbinical beard . Paine 's sister Flower in a long tie-dyed gown , hunched over her electric bass , back to the audience . A disheveled , obviously drunk drummer .

无论如何，他主修哲学，现今的职场对这一专业的人才并不十分需要，所以他决定成为摇滚传奇人物。我们挨饿，伙计，我们有这些毫无希望的小演出和在聚会上演奏，还有一些在一旁交易大麻，并且靠Flower煮的糙米和蔬菜来生存。

source: Paine thought he was going to wind up in Vietnam , so it was live fast and have a good time before you die young . He was like a candle trying to bum out before it gutters , you know ? Then the draft lottery came in and he was like number 360 or something , and it was a reprieve . He started concentrating on the music again , and we got better gigs . We became house band for this place on Irving that was owned by an old Beatnik poet , who felt all we hippies were his kids or something . Just doted on us .
domestication: 派恩当时以为自己肯定会被派到越南，所以他想的是及时行乐，好好享受生活再死去吧。他就像一根蜡烛似的，想在燃烧完之前尽情闪耀，你知道吗？然后征兵抽签制度开始实施，他的号码却是三百六十几的，于是他松了一口气。之后，他又重新专注于音乐，我们也能接到更好的演出机会了。我们成为了伊尔维街上某个地方的固定演出乐队，那家店的老板是个老嬉皮士诗人，他把我们这些年轻人当成了自己的孩子一样疼爱，非常宠溺我们。
foreignization: 佩恩认为他最终会被送到越南去，所以他想趁着年轻快活一下，好好享受生活。就像一根蜡烛想要在熄灭之前燃烧殆尽，你知道吗？然后征兵抽签开始了，他的号码是360之类的，这让他得以幸免。他开始重新专注于音乐，我们也得到了更好的演出机会。我们成为位于 Irving 街的一家场馆的驻场乐队，那家店铺由一位老波西米亚式诗人拥有，他觉得我们这些嬉皮士都是他的孩子似的，非常宠爱我们。

source: But anyway , sometimes she 'd sneak out and we 'd go to the coffee shop . I was n't all that impressed by Commonsense . They were , well , an okay cover band with delusions of grandeur . Paine wrote some nice stuff , but it was uninspired , like a bluesy Jim Morrison without clinical insanity , and they just were n't good enough musicians to carry it off . I had a crush on Flower 's back - who did n't ? - but then they got this incredible , hot new drummer named Sage . It was like the band suddenly had a backbone . Like they were crawling up out of the sea to evolve .
domestication: 不过话说回来，有时候她会偷偷溜出来，我们就会去咖啡店。我对Commonsense这个乐队并没有特别的印象，他们只是一个还不错的cover乐队，却有着过高的野心。Paine写的歌还行，但是缺乏灵感，就像一个没有精神病的布鲁斯·莫里森一样，他们的演奏也没有达到可以让人信服的地步。我曾经对Flower背后的那个人有好感——谁不会呢？——但是后来他们来了一个令人难以置信的、性感的新鼓手，名叫Sage。就好像乐队突然有了脊梁骨一样，仿佛他们从海里爬出来进化了一样。

source: Have you noticed how people then looked older ? I mean , you look at Bogart or those guys from the old movies , when they were forty they looked ancient . I do n't think it 's just me getting older . It 's better nutrition and less tobacco and antibiotics , something prosaic like that probably , but this guy , he seemed timeless .
domestication: 你有没有发现过去的人看起来都比较老？比如说，你看鲍勃·霍普或是老电影里的那些演员，当他们四十岁的时候就已经看起来很老了。我觉得这不只是因为我自己变老了，主要是现在的营养条件更好，吸烟的人少了，抗生素也用的更合理了，可能就是这些平凡的小事。但这个家伙，他看起来却像时间静止了一样，毫无岁月痕迹。

你有没有注意到人们那时候看起来更老？我的意思是，你看看波加特或者那些旧电影里的演员，当他们40岁的时候，看起来就已经很老了。我不认为这只是因为我自己越来越老了。这可能是由于营养更好、吸烟和使用抗生素的比例更低，这些很平凡的事情，但是这个家伙，他看起来却很超越时间。

source: Guiseppi Scapellini : Tom Paine 's Commonsense played seven weeks in a row at the Fillmore . Their first album , Rites of Man , came out soon after , in ' 72 , earning them a place in rock history for their meteoric rise and brief anticlimactic career . They simply never repeated their early success . The subsequent albums were still fine quality music , but they never advanced .
domestication: 吉塞皮·斯卡佩利尼：汤姆·佩恩的乐队Commonsense在菲尔莫尔剧院连续演出七周。他们的第一张专辑《人之礼仪》在72年发行后不久，他们凭借一飞冲天和短暂而平淡的职业生涯，在摇滚乐史上占有一席之地。但是他们很快就销声匿迹了，再也没能重现早期的辉煌。虽然后来的专辑仍然很有质量，但就是没有了新意，也没有任何进步。
foreignization: Giuseppi Scapellini：汤姆·佩恩的Commonsense连续七周在Fillmore演出，他们的第一张专辑，Rites of Man，不久后，在72年发行，使他们在摇滚乐历史上占有一席之地，因为他们迅速崛起并且短暂的无惊无险的职业生涯。他们简单地从未重现他们早期的成功。随后的专辑仍然是质量很好的音乐，但是他们从未进步。

source: But then they kept doing the same thing over and over . Their albums sold steady if not sensational , and they toured with black capes and special effects and all . So they were n't only the first goth band , like they 're called now , they were the first mass market sellouts . Well okay , not really . But I 'd seen them from the beginning , so I took it personally .
domestication: 他们一开始还挺有意思的，但是后来就老套了，总是重复同样的东西。他们的专辑销量平稳，但不算爆炸性热卖，他们还会带着黑斗篷和特效进行巡演。所以，他们不仅被称为第一支哥特乐队，而且还是第一批大众市场的出卖派。但是，说实话，他们也不是那么回事。我从他们成立初期就开始关注他们，所以我对此很有感触。
foreignization: 但是接着他们不断重复同样的事情。他们的专辑稳定地卖，如果不是非常畅销，他们也带着黑色斗篷和特效去巡演。所以他们不仅仅是现在被称为的第一支哥特乐队，他们也是第一个大众市场的出卖者。好吧，算了，不是真的。但是我从一开始就见过他们，所以我把这件事当成个人恩怨。

source: Johnny Goldberg : I went into seclusion in a commune in Sonoma , the Russian River , for a while , until I realized everyone there was leaching off my fame and money , so I moved to this cabin in Alaska . After a couple years I decided it was time to get back to civilization , plumbing and electricity and all . An old friend from Berkeley turned me on to the Macintosh 128 , and we started messing around with it and now we have this business where we design software for musicians and artists and stuff . Animators , mostly . Every time you see a dinosaur wink , that 's my algorithm . Not blinking , that 's someone else .
domestication: 约翰尼·戈德堡说：我曾在索诺玛的一个俄罗斯河畔的修行社区里隐居了一段时间，直到我意识到所有人都在搭我的顺风车，骗取我的名声和钱财。后来，我搬到了阿拉斯加的一间小木屋。两年后，我决定是时候回到文明世界了，什么自来水、电力那些东西一应俱全。来自伯克利的一位老朋友向我介绍了麦金托什128电脑，我们便开始玩弄它，结果我们开启了一个设计软件的生意，专门为音乐家、艺术家等人提供服务。主要是为动画师们做的。你每次看到恐龙眨眼，那都是我的算法。要是没眨眼，那就不是我的作品了。

source: What Hannah remembered best were their walks together . She , his youngest , helped him to collect leaves from a great variety of trees and shrubs . He identified them , labeled them in Latin . Later she would help him press the specimens in large volumes . During the long Maine winters they would haul out those books , pouring over them , recalling where they found each one .
domestication: 汉娜记忆最深的就是他们一起散步的时候。她作为家里最小的孩子，总是帮助父亲从各种各样的树木和灌木上采集树叶。父亲会告诉她每种树叶的名称，并用拉丁文标记。后来，她会帮父亲把这些标本压在大书里。冬天的时候，他们就会把那些书拿出来，一起仔细研究，回忆着每片树叶是在哪里采集的。
foreignization: 汉娜最记得的是他们一起散步的事。她，作为他最小的孩子，帮助他从许多不同种类的树和灌木上采集叶子。他会辨认这些叶子，并用拉丁文给它们标上名字。后来她会帮他把这些标本压在大册子里。在漫长的缅因州冬天里，他们会把那些书拿出来，仔细研究，回忆每一个标本是在哪里采集到的。

source: The Bates farm was eight miles from the town of Codman where Hannah had been born and raised . She had never been that far away . She and Mr. Bates had left after lunch , and he hoped to make it by supper time . After the first half hour they had traveled farther than she had ever roamed in her berrying or leaf hunting with her father .
domestication: 贝茨家的农场离汉娜出生和长大的柯德曼镇有八英里远，她以前从未走过这么远的路。她和贝茨先生在吃完午饭后就出发了，他希望能在晚饭前到达。在出发后的头半个小时里，他们已经走过的地方比汉娜过去跟父亲去采浆果或挖野菜时走过的路还要远。汉娜对这一点很是惊讶，她心里不禁有些忐忑，毕竟她以前从来没有离开过自己的家乡。
foreignization: 贝茨的农场距离汉娜出生和长大的科德曼镇有八英里远。她从未离家这么远。她和贝茨先生在午餐后动身，他希望能在晚餐时到达。在最初的半个小时里，他们已经比汉娜和父亲一起去采浆果或采叶时走得更远。

source: The road had been fairly firm when they started-only an inch or two of mud over the lingering spring frost . But as they descended a long , gradual hill , she could see a desolate stretch of shrubby growth . Some fields had been cleared for pasturage , but the rest was a mix of juniper , chokeberry , and blueberry . It was early spring and nothing had leafed out yet . It looked to her like the Slough of Despond .
domestication: 他们出发时，路还算平整，只有一两寸厚的泥土覆盖在春天残留的霜冻上。但当他们沿着长长的缓坡往下走时，她看到了一片荒凉的灌木丛。有些田地已经被清理出来作为牧场，但剩下的却是一片混杂的鼠尾草、黑加仑子和蓝莓。这还是早春，什么都还没开始发芽，看起来就像一片绝望的沼泽，让人感到十分沮丧。她想，这简直就是《天路历程》里的“绝望深渊”。
foreignization: 道路一开始还算坚实——只有一英寸或两英寸的泥土覆盖在春天尚未消退的冰冻层上。但是当他们下一个漫长而缓缓的斜坡时，她可以看到一片荒凉的灌木丛生区。有些田地被清理出来用于放牧，但是其他地方是柏树、越橘和蓝莓的混合体。这是早春，什么都还没有长出叶子来。在她看来，这就像绝望沼泽。

source: For a while Mr. Bates was able to find solid ground between the road and the stone walls that ran continually along this stretch , but soon even this section proved soft . He was about to cross back when the left front wheel plunged deep into the mud and the horse stopped dead . Mr. Bates coaxed her forward-first left and then right-but there was no moving the buckboard .
domestication: 贝茨先生一边走，一边发现公路和路旁的石墙之间有一块地面比较结实，就赶着马车朝那边驶去。可是没走几步，那块地面也塌陷了。他正准备调转马头回到公路上，这时马车左前轮突然陷入泥泞，马也停下不动了。贝茨先生在马 ear旁轻声说着好话，先是让马向左走，后来又让马向右走，但马车就是纹丝不动。
foreignization: 一会儿，贝茨先生能够在这段路和沿途一直延伸的石墙之间找到实地，但很快连这一部分也被证明是松软的。当他准备重新回到坚硬的地面时，左前轮深深陷入泥中，马匹停止了前进。 贝茨先生鼓励她向前移动——先左后右——但无法移动这辆四轮马车。

source: " If it is his Decision to send me Home , " she wrote , " I must find a Way not to be a Burden for you and the boys . Perhaps I should consider working at the Mill . It may be that the French and Italians are not as Crude and Unwashed as we have always assumed . As I write , I have no notion of what he plans for me . I study his Face when he is not looking , hoping that in his Expression he will reveal his Intent , but his Mood is Locked within him . "
domestication: 如果他决定让我回家，她写道，那么我就得想办法不给你和孩子们添麻烦。也许我应该考虑在工厂工作。我们一直以为法国人和意大利人很粗鲁很邋遢，但也许事实并非如此。当我写这些的时候，我完全不知道他对我的计划是什么。我经常偷偷地看他的脸，希望能从他的表情中看出一些端倪，但他的心思就像锁起来的一样，完全无法猜透。
foreignization: “如果他决定让我回家，”她写道，“我必须找到一种方法，不要成为你们和孩子们的负担。也许我应该考虑在工厂工作。也许法国人和意大利人没有我们一直以为的那么粗鲁和不修边幅。 当我写这段话时，我不知道他为我计划了什么。我在他不注意时偷看他的脸，希望通过他的表情他能透露他的意图，但他的心情被深锁在他的内心。”

It may be that the French and Italians are not as Crude and Unwashed as we have always assumed . As I write , I have no notion of what he plans for me . I study his Face when he is not looking , hoping that in his Expression he will reveal his Intent , but his Mood is Locked within him . "
“如果他决定让我回家，”她写道，“我必须找到一种方法，不要成为你们和孩子们的负担。也许我应该考虑在工厂工作。也许法国人和意大利人没有我们一直以为的那么粗鲁和不修边幅。 当我写这段话时，我不知道他为我计划了什么。我在他不注意时偷看他的脸，希望通过他的表情他能透露他的意图，但他的心情被深锁在他的内心。”

source: She wished she could simply write a note to Mr. Bates and slip away . A brief and courteous note . She would thank him for his kindness . It would take a day to walk to Codman even if she did n't have the trunk . She would have to ask Mr. Bates to hitch up the buckboard .

source: With the scene came doubt . Had that truly been a proposal of marriage ? Could she have dreamed the scene with such detail ? He had not mentioned it at dinner nor all evening . source: The reverend had graduated from a seminary in Boston and was generally regarded to be as learned as a judge . You could tell that from his sermons which were long and incomprehensible . To Hannah 's surprise , however , the conversation turned out to be perfectly ordinary . No complicated talk about the nature of the Elect , the attributes of the Holy Ghost , or the terrible subtlety of unintentional sin . No different , really , from idle talk with the grocer or with women she met at the store .
domestication: 牧师是在波士顿的一所神学院毕业的，被人普遍认为学识渊博得跟法官不相上下。从他讲的那些长篇大论、令人费解的讲道就可以看出来。但让汉娜感到惊讶的是，他们的交谈竟然完全是平常的家长里短。没有关于被选中者的本质、圣灵的特性或者无意中犯错的可怕细微差别的复杂讨论。跟跟杂货店老板或在商店遇到的女人们闲聊也没什么两样。

source: It was strange indeed returning to the farm , knowing that it was in some way her farm too . She opened the back door for Mr. Bates and Solomon , stepping aside to let them enter , and then lingered at the threshold . The kitchen had its familiar , distinctive mix of smells -- wood , smoke , and vinegar . Her kitchen now . Yet she felt like a clock wound tight to the breaking point .

source: Lighting a candle with a taper , she went upstairs . In the darkened hallway she peered into his room . It was stark , ' unadorned . The downstairs room that his mother had occupied for so many years would have been more inviting . It still had a woman 's touch -- curtains , a rug , and a framed etching of a cow in a meadow . But he would not sleep in his mother 's bed ; she knew that without asking . As she stared at his iron bed , shadows trembling in the candlelight , she heard the beginning of rain on the roof .

source: On their sides they pressed together , rubbing faces like two horses in the field . If it could have stayed like this , it would have been sweet as a dream , but with a jolt she discovered that men grew like dogs in heat . Of course ! This was what would come next . More , it must come next . If either of them faltered , if they did not manage it tonight , it would be hanging over them the next day and the day after that . She might even lose him .

source: A Lamaze Certified Childbirth Educator , Sally Lochowski Tanaka uses poetry " to communicate the emotional aspects of birthing and parenting to clients , patients , and colleagues . " Here , in her own poem , Sally touches on the poignant stages of motherhood . " Pregnant women relate to the first verse as they anticipate the newborn coming soon into their lives , " she says . " Moms with other children find they can identify with the later stages of mothering . And grandmothers recognize the full circle of caring for -- and letting go of -- a beloved child . "
domestication: 洛可斯基·田中是一位认证的分娩教育师，她利用诗歌与客户、病人和同事们交流分娩和育儿的情感方面。在她自己的这首诗中，她触及了母爱中最感人的阶段。她说：“孕妇们会对第一段产生共鸣，因为她们期待着新生命即将进入自己的生活。” “有其他孩子的母亲会发现她们可以理解母爱的后期阶段。奶奶们也会认识到照顾和放手一个深爱的孩子的全部过程。” 她的话就像一条温暖的绳索，轻轻地把所有的母亲紧紧地联系在一起，让人们感受到母爱的深厚和无私。

source: Gardner Dozois sat in his office at Asimov 's with a strange expression on his normally jolly hirsute face . Gazing abstractedly out the window , he fondled an expensive-looking chrome gadget which I mistook at first for a Star Ways prop . I clapped the editorheartily on his shoulder and made what I thought was a decent joke .

domestication: 我在华盛顿广场的长椅上消磨时间，直到两点。在那段时间里，我无意中听到了普通孩子、十几岁的少年和大人们的讨论，他们的话题五花八门，有些人在探讨星际帝国的管治问题，比如说到底应该采用自顶向下的还是自底向上的架构，还有一些人在争论“水边”和“边境”这两个词有什么区别，以及是否还适用威尔斯提出的“奇特事物不可过多”的法则，这一切都让我感到很有意思，也让我深刻地认识到，这些人在日常生活中对待问题的态度是非常严谨和认真的。

source: Dazed and bewildered , I staggered over to the Flatiron Building to meet with Gordon Van Gelder . For one brief moment I could pretend that the strange mental virus " in the air " had failed to infect the youthful editor of F &SF,; for he sat calmly , reading a magazine . But then I noticed that the stubblecheeked boyish blue-penciller was examining not his usual copy of Publishers Weekly , but rather a glossy museum catalog . Spying me , he set the catalog aside and extended his hand .
domestication: 我迷迷糊糊、步履蹒跚地走到扁铁大楼与戈登·范·盖尔德见面。一时间，我可以假装那股弥漫在空气中的奇怪的精神病毒没有感染这位《幻想与科学小说》的年轻编辑，因为他镇定地坐着，正在看一本杂志。但是接着我注意到，这位有胡茬的、看起来很年轻的蓝铅笔编辑不是在读他的通常的《出版商周刊》，而是一本光鲜的博物馆目录。当他看到我时，他把目录放在一边，伸出了手。

我迷惑而茫然地踉跄着走向平铁大楼，去与戈登·范·盖尔德会面。在短暂的一刻，我可以假装空气中奇怪的精神病毒没有感染年轻的《幻想与科幻》杂志编辑；因为他镇静地坐着，读着一本杂志。但是接着我注意到，这个胡须邋遢的像男孩一样涂蓝色铅笔的编辑并不是在看他的通常的《出版商周刊》，而是一本光滑的博物馆目录。当他看到我时，他放下了目录并伸出了手。

I stopped Patrick Nielsen Hayden and asked despondently if perhaps he planned on remaining behind to salvage this mess . " Moi ? Au con traire . Teresa and I have been tapped as hosts for a new network morning show . Regis and Kathie Lee , watch your ratings ! "

source: He slammed the phone down and turned to me . " Sorry about that . But my new line of Hawaiian shirts is slated to debut in Milan next week , and I need to make sure we can fill all the anticipated orders . As soon as the buzz starts in Women 's Wear Daily , I 'm outta this sinking ship ! " Well , I beat Hartwell out the Tor offices by a week or so . But unlike him , I had no destination other than a dark bar . After six drinks - and a desultory discussion with the bartender about firstcontact protocols - that was where the ghost found me .
domestication: 他重重地挂断了电话，然后转向我。“对不起啊。但我的新夏威夷衬衫系列下周要在米兰首发，我需要确保我们可以满足所有预期的订单。一旦《女性时尚日报》开始炒作，我就要离开这艘快要沉没的船！”好吧，我比哈特韦尔早离开了托尔出版社大约一周。但是和他不同的是，我没有一个明确的目的地，只是漫步到了一个昏暗的酒吧。在喝了六杯酒之后，还和酒吧服务员闲聊了一番关于“初次接触”协议——就在那里，鬼魂找到了我。

He slammed the phone down and turned to me . " Sorry about that . But my new line of Hawaiian shirts is slated to debut in Milan next week , and I need to make sure we can fill all the anticipated orders . White-on-white tie . Diamond rings . How could you fall for a straight john like that ? Well , that 's water over the bridge . Then suddenly -- whoa ! This other passion is cooking for Maizie . They 're probably surprised to know you got hurt feelings ! "
domestication: 你看，当你信任一个人时，你会认真听他说话，并且相信他说的话。一旦他成为你的朋友，你就会不加质疑地接受他说的所有事情。这时，即使他开始撒谎，你也会相信，因为你需要相信。要是你房间里有他的照片，那家伙完全是井底之蛙，对吧？一个从事房地产的男人，西装领带一身白，戴着钻戒。你怎么会被这么一个普通人骗住呢？算了，这些都是水过鸭子背的事了。然后突然——哇！原来还有个叫Maizie的人对他很重要。他们可能会很惊讶，知道你也有伤心的时候！

" To give someone trust or credibility , you listen to them and then buy into what they tell you . After they become your friend , you take on faith whatever else they may be pushing . Then they start lying and you believe them because you need to believe . If that was his picture in your room , the dude 's a total square , baby . A man involved in real estate . White-on-white tie . Diamond rings . How could you fall for a straight john like that ? Well , that 's water over the bridge . Then suddenly -- whoa ! This other passion is cooking for Maizie . They 're probably surprised to know you got hurt feelings ! "

要让某人相信你或认为你有可信度，你要听他们的话，然后相信他们所说的一切。在他们成为你的朋友之后，你会无条件地接受他们可能正在宣扬的其他东西。然后他们开始撒谎，你也会相信他们，因为你需要相信。如果他在你的房间里的照片，那家伙完全是个书呆子，宝贝。一个从事房地产的男人。白色领带。钻石戒指。你怎么能相信像他这样的直男呢？好吧，那已经是过去的事情了。突然——哇！还有另一个激情是为Maisie做饭。他们可能会惊讶地知道你受到了感情伤害！

source: " But there were troubles yesterday . We always got troubles . Walk around on this planet and you 're gon na have troubles . Only the mind does amazing things . It forgets the pain . You see pictures of people in a death camp -- some guy points a camera at them and they smile , or somebody shows you a picture of Johnny and he 's smiling and somebody says , ' Yeah , we took that shot of him four days before he blew his head off with the twelve-gauge . ' Life is tricky that way . Fools you . I could do it , you know . I could blow my head off right now . " She sensed real anguish in his voice but could n't think of anything positive to say . There was a long pause .
domestication: 昨天也发生了麻烦事儿，我们总是有麻烦事儿。这世界上到处都有麻烦，只有思想才能做出惊人的事情——它能忘记疼痛。你看那些集中营里的照片，有人对着镜头微笑，或者有人给你看约翰尼的照片，他也在笑，有人说：“是啊，我们是在他用霰弹枪自杀的四天前拍的那张照片。”生活就是这样令人费解，骗人。我也可以做到，你知道，我现在就可以把头吹掉。她从他的声音里感受到真正的痛苦，但想不出什么好话来说，两人沉默了很久。
foreignization: " 但昨天有麻烦事发生。我们总是有麻烦事。走在这个星球上，你就会遇到麻烦事。只有大脑会做出惊人的事情，它忘记了痛苦。你看到集中营里的人的照片——有人指着相机对着他们，他们在微笑，或者有人给你看约翰尼的照片，他也在微笑，有人说，‘是的，我们四天前才拍的那张照片，然后他就用12号霰弹枪把自己的头打爆了。’生活就是这样诡异地欺骗你。我可以做到，你知道。我现在就可以把自己的头打爆。" 她感觉到了他声音中的真实痛苦，但却想不出任何积极的话来说。有一阵子沉默。

source: It took considerable effort but she was able to pulp down a last few swallows of gin and edge over away from the side of the bed . Some of the liquor rolled off her chin , down her neck , over the satin pillowcase . Her special crystal nightcap goblet fell to the hardwood floor and smashed . Day keeper would find the necklace and sell it . Land her ass in jail .
domestication: 她使出了吃奶的力气，终于把最后几口杜松子酒吞了下去，然后慢慢地从床边挪开了一点儿。一些酒液顺着她的下巴滴落到脖子上，又流到了缎子的枕套上。她的特别的水晶夜帽杯子掉到了硬木地板上，摔得粉碎。管家会找到那条项链，然后卖掉它，到时候她可就有麻烦了，肯定会被关进大牢。
foreignization: 她花了很大的力气才把最后几口杜松子酒吞了下去，然后挪开身子，离开床边。有些酒从她的下巴滴落到脖子上，然后流到缎子靠垫上。 她那特殊的水晶夜间帽杯掉到了硬木地板上并摔碎了。 管家会找到项链然后卖掉它，把她送进监狱。

source: All afternoon there had been a chilly , puttering rain ; now , though the sky had cleared with the onset of dusk , she could feel the dampness lingering in her sinuses , her extremities . Perhaps she was coming down with the flu . She hoped so . Stuck in rush-hour traffic , the tinny roar of the heater her only comfort , she conceived a vision of herself dozing in bed , sipping fatty soups , watching TV , and acting generally like the pampered creature she was destined but for circumstance to be . Oh God , she hoped to hell it was the flu . But she did not really think it was .
domestication: 整个下午都在下着毛毛雨，让人感到阴森森的。现在，虽然天色渐暗，雨已经停了，但她仍能感觉到寒气留在她的鼻腔和四肢里。也许她要感冒了，她希望如此。被堵在交通拥挤的路上，只有暖气的单调嗡嗡声让她感到安慰，她开始幻想自己蜷缩在床上，喝着肥腻的汤，看着电视，过着她注定要过却因种种原因没能过上的娇生惯养的生活。哦，老天爷，她真心希望是感冒。但她又真的不这么认为。
foreignization: 整个下午都有一种令人感到寒冷的细雨；现在，虽然天空随着黄昏的降临而放晴，但她还是能感觉到凉爽的气息残留在她的鼻窦和四肢上。也许她要感染流感了。她希望如此。在拥堵的交通中，唯一能带来安慰的是暖气的嘈杂声，她构想出一个自己在床上打瞌睡、喝肥腻的汤、看电视、并表现出一般被娇惯的生物（这种生物是她注定要成为的，但因情况而未能成为）的样子。哦，上帝，她真心希望那是流感。但她并不是真的这么认为。

Stuck in rush-hour traffic , the tinny roar of the heater her only comfort , she conceived a vision of herself dozing in bed , sipping fatty soups , watching TV , and acting generally like the pampered creature she was destined but for circumstance to be . Oh God , she hoped to hell it was the flu . But she did not really think it was .

source: It was Kevin who had talked her into this cooperative preschool in the first place . Parent involvement , he 'd said , was the coming thing : responsible , statistically persuasive , and cheaper to boot . Which was approximately the same line of reasoning he 'd applied a few months later to getting divorced .
domestication: 是凯文一开始说服她去这家合作幼儿园的。他说家长参与孩子教育是现在的潮流，这样不仅有责任感，而且从统计数据上来说也很有说服力，最关键的是还能省钱。其实他几个月后决定离婚时用的也是同样的理由。
foreignization: 就是凯文说服她来这个合作式幼儿园的。 他说，家长参与，是未来的趋势：有责任感，在统计上令人信服，并且还便宜。 这大致是他几个月后离婚时所用的相同推理。

source: " I just want you all to know that Harvey and I -- and I think I speak for both of us even though he 's not here tonight ? Because we really love you guys on staff , the work you do , you 're like part of our family , your patience , your involvement , your ... and we believe in labor , we do . We support it . Even though we 're not technically working class ourselves , of course , and sometimes , like with the Teamsters , or the restaurant workers downtown , a couple years ago , those indictments ? ... But what I want to say is that this measure , we support it , both of us do ... completely
domestication: 大家听着，我跟哈维都非常感谢你们这些工作人员，虽然他今天不在这里，但我相信我可以代表我们两人的心意，我们把你们当成家人一样看待，因为你们工作很辛苦，总是那么有耐心和投入。尽管我们自己不属于劳动阶层，但是我们始终支持劳工运动，就像以前团结起来支持运输工会或者市中心餐厅的工人，当他们面临指控时，我们都站在了他们的一边。所以呢，这次的决议，我们两个人都完全支持。
foreignization: "我只是想让你们所有人知道，哈维和我——而且我认为我代表我们两人说话，即使他今晚不在这里？因为我们真正爱你们这些员工，你们所做的工作，你们就像我们家庭的一部分，你们的耐心，你们的参与，你们的……我们相信劳动，我们支持它。尽管我们当然不是技术上属于工薪阶层，我们有时，如与运输工会或市中心的餐厅工人几年前那样，那些起诉？...但是我想说的是，这项措施，我们两人都支持它……完全支持它

source: " I just want to say this issue , the one we 're discussing ? I 've had it for a long time . Because my life , it used to be a different ... a different ... like that proposition for the farmworkers , back in ' 81 ? I worked on that . Harvey did n't want me to at first , he thought it took too much time away , I guess , I do n't really remember what he thought . But I said , Harvey ? I believe in labor . I believe people who work hard , and who have families like us , should make as much as we make , and should have benefits that are just as good , and , and , this is very important for me . I have a real issue with -- "
domestication: 我想说的是，这个问题，我们现在正在讨论的？我已经关注很久了。因为我的生活，从前和现在是不一样的……就像八一年农场工人的事，我参与过那件事。哈维一开始不让我去做，他觉得这会占用太多时间，我想他是这么认为的，不过我不太记得他的具体想法。可是我跟哈维说，哈维，我相信劳动。我相信那些辛勤工作、有着和我们一样家庭的人应该赚到和我们一样多的钱，并且应该享有和我们一样好的福利，对我来说这是非常重要的事情。我对某些事情真的很有意见——
foreignization: 我只是想说这个问题，我们正在讨论的？我已经有这个问题很久了。因为我的生活，曾经是不同的……一个不同的……就像那个关于农场工人的提议，回到‘81年？我曾经参与过那件事。哈维最初不希望我这样做，他认为这占用了太多时间，我猜，他当时的想法我真的不记得了。但是我说，哈维？我相信劳工。我相信那些努力工作，并且有像我们一样的家庭的人，应该赚到的钱和我们一样多，也应该拥有同样好的福利，而且，、、这对我来说是非常重要的。我有一个真正的问题是——

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" I just want to say this issue , the one we 're discussing ? I 've had it for a long time . Because my life , it used to be a different ... a different ... like that proposition for the farmworkers , back in ' 81 ? I worked on that . Harvey did n't want me to at first , he thought it took too much time away , I guess , I do n't really remember what he thought . But I said , Harvey ? I believe in labor . I believe people who work hard , and who have families like us , should make as much as we make , and should have benefits that are just as good , and , and , this is very important for me . I have a real issue with -- "

我想说的是，这个问题，我们现在正在讨论的？我已经关注很久了。因为我的生活，从前和现在是不一样的……就像八一年农场工人的事，我参与过那件事。哈维一开始不让我去做，他觉得这会占用太多时间，我想他是这么认为的，不过我不太记得他的具体想法。可是我跟哈维说，哈维，我相信劳动。我相信那些辛勤工作、有着和我们一样家庭的人应该赚到和我们一样多的钱，并且应该享有和我们一样好的福利，对我来说这是非常重要的事情。我对某些事情真的很有意见——

messages_domestication.content:

Abruptly , she stood , muttering something about the bathroom -- it was true , she really did need to go -- all the while hoping no one would notice the tremble in her voice , or the inflamed condition of her cheeks and nose , or the tears that were now in her eyes , too . There was no accounting for them ; they 'd simply arrived , dumbly , brutishly , like strange orphan children towards whom she felt no family feeling but for whom she understood herself somehow responsible . Room would have to be made , but where ? There was no room left .
她突然站起来，嘟囔着说要去洗手间，其实她真的有这个需要，只是希望没人注意到她声音里的颤抖，她脸颊和鼻子发炎的样子，或者她眼里涌出的泪水。这些东西没有任何征兆就出现了，傻乎乎地，蛮横地，就像陌生的孤儿一样，她对他们没有亲情，但不知为什么却觉得自己有责任去照顾他们。必须为他们腾出空间，但是哪里还有空间呢？已经没有空间了。

Abruptly , she stood , muttering something about the bathroom -- it was true , she really did need to go -- all the while hoping no one would notice the tremble in her voice , or the inflamed condition of her cheeks and nose , or the tears that were now in her eyes , too . There was no accounting for them ; they 'd simply arrived , dumbly , brutishly , like strange orphan children towards whom she felt no family feeling but for whom she understood herself somehow responsible . Room would have to be made , but where ? There was no room left .
突然，她站了起来，自言自语地说了一些关于浴室的事——的确，她真的需要去——同时希望没人会注意到她声音里的颤抖，她脸颊和鼻子的发炎状况，或是现在也在她眼中的泪水。这些东西无法解释；它们只是突然出现，愚钝地、残忍地，就像陌生的孤儿一样，她对他们没有任何亲情感觉，但不知怎么的，她觉得自己要为他们负责。必须腾出空间来容纳他们，但是空间在哪里呢？已经没有空间了。

source: " Just a feeling , " he said . " I saw you back there when I first sat down . You looked kind of haughty and impatient , like you were cut off from everything and did n't care . Usually this connotes something medical . " He stubbed out the last of the joint , then closed the ashtray with a snap . " I figured either someone died or else you were pregnant . "

source: " What is it with you people , anyway ? Where do you get your confidence ? Tell me the truth : Was it Mom ? Did she love you so much you think you can just go around doing things ? Like what do you have in mind , Larry ? Form a support group ? Have a bake sale ? Just what are you proposing ? " Her stomach flopped over like a salmon . " Oh , shit , " she wailed , " oh , filthy mother of -- "
domestication: “你们到底怎么回事？哪里来的自信？说实话，是不是妈妈宠的你们这样？难道她对你们太好了，以至于你们以为可以随心所欲吗？拉里，你到底想干什么呢？成立一个支持小组？办个烘焙义卖？你到底在提议什么？她的肚子像鲑鱼一样翻腾。“天啊，”她哀号道，“该死的……”

source: The coat was not there either , though she did find one of Petey 's T-shirts , mislaid since early October . She clutched it with both hands as she followed Sara out . This she decided , was what had been due her . Not reward , but punishment ; not escape , but a deepening of her hole . After all , she had been digging it for years ; it would take more than a little hanky-panky with Larry Albeit at this point to vault herself free .

She placed it on the ballet skirt , fixing it in place with small circular movements .

source: For now she knew . Now when she went back to the commons room and then to her own bedroom where she would pull the blinds , hug her sisters and put her watch inside her jewelry box , she would know why he had jumped waiting for the next day . And when she did n't like something , she might think about what it was like up here on the bridge with the wind blowing about her like God was there . It would be horrible and she would try to laugh or shut her eyes up into a kaleidoscope but other times it would be like she could climb a mountain too if she wanted . Up here with the rubber tire angels she learned a way to feel things to herself she could not explain .
domestication: 现在她明白了。当她回到公共休息室，然后回到自己的卧室，拉上窗帘，拥抱她的姐妹们，并把手表放在首饰盒里时，她就知道为什么他会等待到第二天才跳下去。当她不喜欢某件事情时，她可能会想起站在桥上，风吹过她的头发，仿佛上帝就在那里。那时候她会感到恐惧，想要笑或者闭上眼睛，任由思绪混乱。但有时候，她会觉得自己也可以攀登高山，只要她愿意。在这里，伴随着橡皮轮胎天使的陪伴，她学会了一种感受，这种感受她无法解释，但它属于她自己。

source: With such inducements , such total embrace of our incomplete family such a place to run to -- how could I take mild and whimsical Wendell seriously ? And yet no spiritual comfort would quite match the pleasure of being in bed with him . So I kept the two worlds separate -- sleeping with Wendell when he showed up , flying kites , making jams with him and the children , imposing sprouts and salads , tofu and high-minded blessings on him . No wonder he was exasperated -- the tofu and the blessings were especially not his style -- and found someone else . I felt the loss , felt a little betrayed , but went back to the ashram for another weekend , immersed myself in spirituality , and found it fairly easy to let go .
domestication: 有了如此诱人的生活，有了一个可以逃避现实的地方，还有一个不完美的家庭的全心拥抱，我又怎么能把性情温和、变化莫测的温德尔当真呢？然而，没有任何精神上的安慰能与与他同床共枕的快乐相比。所以，我把这两种生活分开来过， 当温德尔出现时，我就跟他同床共枕，一起放风筝，和孩子们一起做果酱，强迫他吃芽菜和沙拉，豆腐，还给他讲道理。难怪他会感到恼火——尤其是豆腐和说教根本不是他的风格——于是他找到了别人。我感受到了失去他的痛苦，感觉有点被背叛，但我回到了修行中心，又度过了一个周末，沉浸在精神世界里，发现很容易放手。
foreignization: 在这样的诱惑下，在这样一个我不完整的家庭中，有这样一个可以逃避的地方——我怎么可能把温柔而又反复无常的温德尔（Wendell）当真呢？然而，没有任何精神上的安慰能与和他同床共枕的快乐相比。所以，我把这两个世界分开了——当温德尔出现时，我会和他睡觉，一起放风筝，和他还有孩子们一起做果酱，强迫他吃芽菜沙拉，豆腐，还有高尚的祝福。难怪他会感到恼火——尤其是豆腐和祝福根本不是他的风格——于是他找到了别人。我感受到失落，感觉有点被背叛，但我又回到修行所度过了另一个周末，沉浸在精神世界中，我发现放手其实相当容易。

With such inducements , such total embrace of our incomplete family such a place to run to -- how could I take mild and whimsical Wendell seriously ? And yet no spiritual comfort would quite match the pleasure of being in bed with him . No wonder he was exasperated -- the tofu and the blessings were especially not his style -- and found someone else . I felt the loss , felt a little betrayed , but went back to the ashram for another weekend , immersed myself in spirituality , and found it fairly easy to let go .

" Yes , you do . " She grins at me with that sweet old sparkle in her pale blue eyes , with the left pupil smaller than the right because of a car accident from long ago . She puts her arms around me in a great motherly hug , and I feel as always , deeply comforted . But she is so thin , I feel that too . " Mira ! You 're not eating enough ! "
“ 是的，你做到了。”她用那双苍白的蓝眼睛对我微笑，眼中仍然闪烁着曾经的光芒。她的左眼瞳孔比右眼小，这是多年前一场车祸留下的后遗症。她张开双臂抱住我，给我一个母亲般的拥抱，我感到如往常一样，被深深地安慰了。但是，她太瘦了，我也感到了这一点。“米拉！你没吃饱！”

source: " How dark , how strange ! " I exclaim . I have never seen such a Madonna . She is in a stark landscape , a bit of surf in the upper left corner , amidst tall rock formations . The Virgin and child , with his cousin the infant St. John and a serene , sisterly angel , sit in the foreground in a dark grotto , surrounded by great rocks , almost a Stonehenge by the sea . The Virgin 's robe is darkest blue , and the only light is in their faces , the children 's bodies , and a few small white flowers beneath them .
domestication: 哎呀，这画也太阴森了！我从来没见过这样的圣母玛利亚。这幅画里的背景是一片荒凉的大地，只在左上角有一点波浪，几座高大的岩石拔地而起。圣母和孩子坐在前景的黑暗洞穴里，伴随着婴儿施洗约翰和一个脸带宁静、像姐姐一样的天使。他们周围都是巨大的岩石，几乎就像海边的一个巨石阵。圣母的衣服是最深的蓝色，整个画面只有他们的脸、孩子们的身体和脚下的几朵小白花有光亮。整体来说，这幅画真是既奇怪又诡异！
foreignization: “多么黑暗，多么奇怪！”我惊呼，我从未见过这样的圣母玛利亚。她处在一个荒凉的风景中，在左上角有一点波浪，周围是高耸的岩石。圣母和孩子与他的堂弟婴儿圣约翰以及一个宁静的、像姐姐一样的天使坐在前景中的一个黑暗的洞穴中，被巨大的岩石所环绕，几乎是一个位于海边的巨石阵。圣母的长袍是最黑的蓝色，唯一的光线照在他们的脸上，孩子们的身体和他们下面的一些小白花上。

source: How is your friend Mira ? " asks Wendell , as we walk back to his house from the tube station late at night . The air is damp and misty , and the high street is a grayness , with pockets of harsh lighting and occasional neon . We have passed a group of rough young men with shaven heads , and heard the sound of bottles breaking , tossed against a wall for fun .
domestication: 我们从地铁站走回温德尔家时，他问我：“你那位叫米拉的朋友怎么样了？”那是一个深夜，空气中弥漫着湿雾，主街呈现出一种灰蒙蒙的景象，到处都是冷酷的灯光和不时闪烁的霓虹灯。我们刚刚路过一群剃着光头的粗犷年轻人，听到了他们随手扔瓶子打碎的声音，就像在玩游戏一样。
foreignization: 你的朋友米拉怎么样？ 温德尔问道，当我们在深夜从地铁站步行回他家时。 空气潮湿而迷雾，主街是一片灰暗，只有零星的灯光和偶尔的霓虹灯照亮。 我们经过一群光头的粗鲁年轻人，听到瓶子打碎的声音，他们把瓶子扔到墙上只是为了寻找乐趣。

source: " So it all comes down to manners , does it ? You sound quite British , " he smiles . His clothes are all on now . None of mine are . I have been too hurt and angry to bother dressing . He sits down beside me . " I 'm sorry , " he says . " I did n't mean for it to be hard for anyone . I just really wanted to see you . "
domestication: “这么说，归根结底还是礼貌问题吧？”他笑着说，听起来好象是个英国佬。他已经穿好了衣服，而我一件也没穿，因为我太痛苦和愤怒了，根本没心思去考虑穿衣打扮。他在我旁边坐下，“对不起，”他说，“我不是故意要给谁添麻烦的，我只是真的很想见你。”
foreignization: “所以一切都归结于礼仪，是吗？你听起来很英国人，”他微笑着说。他的衣服已经穿好，但我一件也没穿。我太伤心和愤怒了，以至于懒得穿衣服。他坐在我旁边。“我很抱歉，”他说。“我不是故意让事情变得艰难的。我只是真的很想见你。”

He sits down beside me . " I 'm sorry , " he says . " I did n't mean for it to be hard for anyone . I just really wanted to see you . "

source: Soon we are walking across the lawn to Queen 's College , the warm patina of the stone , the glitter of old windows in the wintry sun . The students are still away for the winter break , and most of the doors are locked . Under a stone arcade , we find a brightly lit office , and go in to ask for a key .
domestication: 不一会儿，我们就走过草坪来到了女王学院，石头上有一层温暖的光泽，冬日里的阳光在旧窗户上闪闪发光。学生们还没有放假回来，绝大多数门都锁着。我们在一条石头拱廊下发现了一间灯火通明的办公室，于是走进去借了把钥匙。

source: I begin to feel something too . I always feel a call to meditate when I 'm with Mira . It 's as if there is a presence around her presence , a motherly aura that enfolds her and takes me into its embrace also . I give myself to this feeling , and everything else disappears -- the dark wooden choir stalls , the carved pulpit , the stained glass .
domestication: 我也开始有种感觉了，每当和米拉在一起时，我就会有一种想要冥想的冲动。仿佛她的周围有一种气场，一种母性的光环包围着她，并且也把我纳入其中。我放纵自己去感受这种感觉，其他一切都渐渐消失了——那黑暗的木制合唱团的长椅，那精雕细刻的讲道坛，那彩色的玻璃窗……
foreignization: 我也开始感到有些东西。我总是在与米拉在一起的时候，感到一种冥想的召唤。这就好像在她身边有一种存在，一种包围着她的母性的气场，它也同时将我包裹在它的怀抱中。我将自己交给这种感觉，其它的一切都消失了——那黑色的木制座位，雕刻的讲道台，那彩色玻璃窗。

source: But Mira is not paying any attention . She has stepped down from the wooden stall and is kneeling on the marble tile floor , gazing up at the painting . I shiver with fear , then do the only thing that comes naturally to me at the moment . I join her kneeling in front of the Virgin in voluminous folds of blue , who is just getting the news from that frail angel holding out his lily . I lean forward , in a shiver of ecstasy , and touch my head to the floor .
domestication: 不过米拉根本没在听。她已经从木头柜台上下来，跪在大理石地板上，抬头看着那幅画。我打了个寒战，接着就做了我现在唯一能做到的事情，我也跟着她跪在圣母面前，圣母被层层蓝色衣裙所包裹，她正在从手持百合花的娇弱天使口中得到消息。我向前倾斜，感到一阵狂喜，额头触碰到了地板。
foreignization: 但米拉没有注意到这些。她已经从木头货架上下来，跪在大理石地板上，凝视着那幅画。我感到一阵恐惧，然后做了我当时唯一自然而然的事情。我跪在圣母面前，圣母身穿蓝色华丽长袍，她正从手持百合的脆弱天使那里接到这个消息。我向前倾斜，身上有一种狂喜的战栗，然后将头碰触在地板上。

I shiver with fear , then do the only thing that comes naturally to me at the moment . I join her kneeling in front of the Virgin in voluminous folds of blue , who is just getting the news from that frail angel holding out his lily . I lean forward , in a shiver of ecstasy , and touch my head to the floor .
不过米拉根本没在听。她已经从木头柜台上下来，跪在大理石地板上，抬头看着那幅画。我打了个寒战，接着就做了我现在唯一能做到的事情，我也跟着她跪在圣母面前，圣母被层层蓝色衣裙所包裹，她正在从手持百合花的娇弱天使口中得到消息。我向前倾斜，感到一阵狂喜，额头触碰到了地板。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But Mira is not paying any attention . She has stepped down from the wooden stall and is kneeling on the marble tile floor , gazing up at the painting . I shiver with fear , then do the only thing that comes naturally to me at the moment . I join her kneeling in front of the Virgin in voluminous folds of blue , who is just getting the news from that frail angel holding out his lily . I lean forward , in a shiver of ecstasy , and touch my head to the floor .
但米拉没有注意到这些。她已经从木头货架上下来，跪在大理石地板上，凝视着那幅画。我感到一阵恐惧，然后做了我当时唯一自然而然的事情。我跪在圣母面前，圣母身穿蓝色华丽长袍，她正从手持百合的脆弱天使那里接到这个消息。我向前倾斜，身上有一种狂喜的战栗，然后将头碰触在地板上。

source: Next time I see Mira Bai , we are back in the United States , swimming in a pond where geese are nesting . Her speech has grown strangely halting , and her presence seems vague . " Do you see that lead goose ? " she asks me , after we have pulled ourselves onto a little dock , and sit drying ourselves . " That 's my Grandfather Morrow . He 's come back as that goose to watch over me . Watch now , he 'll lead them right to me . " The goose indeed swims at the head of a flock of eight or nine , swimming in a V formation , right to the dock where we sit dangling our feet in the water . We have no bread to give them .
domestication: 我再次见到米拉拜的时候，我们已经回到了美国，正在一个鹅类筑巢的池塘里游泳。她的讲话变得有些结巴，她的存在感似乎也有些模糊。我们爬上一个小码头，擦干身体后，她问我：“你看到那只领头的鹅吗？”“那是我的祖父莫罗，他转世成那只鹅来保护我。看吧，他会带着它们直接来到我身边。”果然，那只鹅在一群八九只鹅的前面游着，呈现出一字形队列，径直朝我们坐着、把脚浸在水里的码头游来。我们没有面包可以喂它们。

source: She keeps dreaming she wakes up and has to go to work . So she keeps trotting through the restaurant with her tray , even when she 's asleep , squeezes herself between customers , moves back and forth from the tables to the kitchen : one order on top of the other . She can not switch off the movement . When she wakes up , she hears herself screaming above the restaurant 's numbing hum . Even though she wrote everything down , there is always a new order she ca n't remember .
domestication: 她总是做同一个梦，梦见自己醒来就得去上班。在梦中，她还在餐厅里忙碌着，提着托盘穿梭于顾客之间，来回奔跑于桌子和厨房之间，一单接着一单。她就是无法停止这种动作。等她醒来时，却发现自己在餐厅的嘈杂声中发出尖叫。即使她把所有订单都记了下来，还是会有新订单让她想不起来。她简直被工作耗尽了精力，连做梦都逃不了。
foreignization: 她一直做着醒来然后必须去上班的梦，所以她一直在餐厅里提着托盘走来走去，即使是在睡觉的时候，也会挤过顾客，来回奔波于桌子和厨房之间：一单接着一单。她无法停止这种动作。当她醒来时，她听到自己在餐厅那令人麻木的嗡嗡声中大喊大叫。尽管她把一切都写了下来，但总是会有一个新的订单她记不住。

source: In the morning Sylvia eats only a little mandarin orange . She picks up her bag that is standing on the table and checks to see that the cigarettes , the lighter , the handkerchiefs , and the purse are inside . At the front door she drops in the keys . She maneuvers her bicycle out of the hallway , weaving between two trash cans . Then she pulls the door closed .
domestication: 早上，西尔维亚只是吃了个小小的橘子，就准备出门。她把放在桌子上的包拿起来，检查了一下里面有没有香烟、打火机、手帕和钱包。到了前门，她顺便把钥匙也丢进包里。然后，她从走廊里骑出了自行车，在两个垃圾桶之间左躲右闪。最后，她一只手拉着门，一只手扶着车把，把门关上了。
foreignization: 在早晨，西尔维亚只吃了一个小的柑橘。 她提起放在桌子上的袋子，并检查确认香烟、打火机、手帕和钱包都在里面。 在前门口，她丢下钥匙。 然后她将自行车从走廊里转出来，在两个垃圾桶之间穿梭。 之后她拉上门。

In the morning Sylvia eats only a little mandarin orange . She picks up her bag that is standing on the table and checks to see that the cigarettes , the lighter , the handkerchiefs , and the purse are inside . At the front door she drops in the keys . She maneuvers her bicycle out of the hallway , weaving between two trash cans . Then she pulls the door closed .
在早晨，西尔维亚只吃了一个小的柑橘。 她提起放在桌子上的袋子，并检查确认香烟、打火机、手帕和钱包都在里面。 在前门口，她丢下钥匙。 然后她将自行车从走廊里转出来，在两个垃圾桶之间穿梭。 之后她拉上门。

source: On her second day in the restaurant she had to wait on four Germans . She tried to explain to them what was on the menu . They were amused by her explanation . Each of the four wanted something different . The tray was too small for her to bring the whole order to their table in one trip . When she finally arrived with four portions of French fries , she noticed the headwaiter got there first . The Germans were laughing even louder . When the cook noticed she had come back to the kitchen , crying , he said : " You 'll have to get used to it here . "
domestication: 在餐厅的第二天，她就碰到了四个德国人，让她为难。她试着给他们介绍菜单，他们却被她的解释逗得哈哈大笑。四个人每个人都点了不同的东西，托盘太小，没法一次性地端完所有东西。等她好不容易带着四份薯条过来时，却发现领班已经捷足先登。德国人笑得更厉害了。当厨师看到她哭着回到厨房时，说：“这里你得习惯点儿。”
foreignization: 在餐厅的第二天，她不得不服务四个德国人。她试图向他们解释菜单上的东西是什么。他们被她的解释逗乐了。四个人每个人都想要不同的东西。托盘对她来说太小了，她无法在一次就把整个订单带到他们的餐桌上。当她终于带着四份法式薯条到达时，她注意到领班服务员先到了那里。德国人笑得更大声了。当厨师注意到她哭着回到了厨房时，他说：“你将不得不在这里习惯它。”

Translate the following text to Chinese.

On her second day in the restaurant she had to wait on four Germans . She tried to explain to them what was on the menu . They were amused by her explanation . Each of the four wanted something different . The tray was too small for her to bring the whole order to their table in one trip . When she finally arrived with four portions of French fries , she noticed the headwaiter got there first . The Germans were laughing even louder . When the cook noticed she had come back to the kitchen , crying , he said : " You 'll have to get used to it here . "
在餐厅的第二天，她就碰到了四个德国人，让她为难。她试着给他们介绍菜单，他们却被她的解释逗得哈哈大笑。四个人每个人都点了不同的东西，托盘太小，没法一次性地端完所有东西。等她好不容易带着四份薯条过来时，却发现领班已经捷足先登。德国人笑得更厉害了。当厨师看到她哭着回到厨房时，说：“这里你得习惯点儿。”

On her second day in the restaurant she had to wait on four Germans . She tried to explain to them what was on the menu . They were amused by her explanation . Each of the four wanted something different . The tray was too small for her to bring the whole order to their table in one trip . When she finally arrived with four portions of French fries , she noticed the headwaiter got there first . The Germans were laughing even louder . When the cook noticed she had come back to the kitchen , crying , he said : " You 'll have to get used to it here . "
在餐厅的第二天，她不得不服务四个德国人。她试图向他们解释菜单上的东西是什么。他们被她的解释逗乐了。四个人每个人都想要不同的东西。托盘对她来说太小了，她无法在一次就把整个订单带到他们的餐桌上。当她终于带着四份法式薯条到达时，她注意到领班服务员先到了那里。德国人笑得更大声了。当厨师注意到她哭着回到了厨房时，他说：“你将不得不在这里习惯它。”

source: When she closes her eyes the confusion begins again . The hum of the clients , the clatter of eating utensils beats through her brain . She feels faint again . Maybe the cold will help . She stays in the kitchen , sitting on a chair . The window looks out on a blank wall that protects a garden gone wild . She hates this view . She thinks of the work of the people who made the objects in the kitchen . After a while she begins to cry . She feels herself getting closer and closer to the objects . But it will pass . It will pass , she thinks , it will . She feels tired . I only get paid to wash those dishes . I just sell myself . And what do I have left ?
domestication: 她一闭上眼睛，混乱又开始了。顾客的喧闹声，餐具的叮当声在她脑中回荡。她又感到头晕了。也许冷空气能帮助她清醒一下，她决定留在厨房里，坐在椅子上。窗户外是一堵空白的墙，墙后是一个已经被忽视的花园。她讨厌这样的景色。她想到了制作厨房里那些物品的人们。过了一会儿，她开始哭泣。她觉得自己越来越接近这些物品。但这一切都会过去的，她告诉自己，这一切都会过去的。她感到疲倦。“我只为洗那些碗碟而领工资，我只是出卖自己。到头来，我还剩下什么呢？”
foreignization: 当她闭上眼睛时，困惑又开始了。客户的喧闹声，餐具的碰撞声在她的脑海中回荡。她再次感到头晕。也许寒冷会有帮助。她呆在厨房里，坐在一张椅子上。窗户外是一堵空白的墙，墙后是一个杂草丛生的花园。她讨厌这景色。她思考着制作厨房里物品的人们所做的工作。过了一会儿，她开始哭泣。她感觉自己越来越接近这些物品。但是这将会过去。它将会过去，她想，它将会过去。她感到疲倦。我只为洗那些碗碟而领工资。我只是出卖自己。而我还剩下什么？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When she closes her eyes the confusion begins again . The hum of the clients , the clatter of eating utensils beats through her brain . She feels faint again . Maybe the cold will help . She stays in the kitchen , sitting on a chair . The window looks out on a blank wall that protects a garden gone wild . She hates this view . She thinks of the work of the people who made the objects in the kitchen . After a while she begins to cry . She feels herself getting closer and closer to the objects . But it will pass . It will pass , she thinks , it will . She feels tired . I only get paid to wash those dishes . I just sell myself . And what do I have left ?

source: When the lights came up at intermission , Finn turned to James Chase and said , " I 'm going to give Rebecca a miss , I think . I remember this as being the better of the two , and even this is starting to show its age . All this malarkey about how magical the two of them are together . Did n't seem so bloody magical to me . Ingrid Bergman reconciles me to living in the age of Julia Roberts . "
domestication: 灯光亮起时，中场休息的时间到了，芬恩转向詹姆斯·蔡斯，说：“我想我要放弃瑞贝卡了，我记得这两部电影中，这是一部较好的，但即使是它也开始显现出老态了。他们在一起时充满魔力的说法，全都像无稽之谈。这些东西在我看来根本没那么神奇。在这个朱莉娅·罗伯茨当红的时代，英格丽·褒曼让我这个人觉得活着更有意义。”
foreignization: 当灯光在中场休息时亮起，芬恩转向詹姆斯·切斯并说，“我想我要错过丽贝卡。我记得这两个中这是更好的一个，即使这个也开始显现出它的老态。所有这些关于他们两个在一起是如何神奇的废话。在我看来一点也不神奇。在朱莉娅·罗伯茨的时代，英格丽·伯格曼让我安心地活着。”

messages_domestication.content:

When the lights came up at intermission , Finn turned to James Chase and said , " I 'm going to give Rebecca a miss , I think . Ingrid Bergman reconciles me to living in the age of Julia Roberts . "

When the lights came up at intermission , Finn turned to James Chase and said , " I 'm going to give Rebecca a miss , I think . I remember this as being the better of the two , and even this is starting to show its age . All this malarkey about how magical the two of them are together . Did n't seem so bloody magical to me . Ingrid Bergman reconciles me to living in the age of Julia Roberts . "
当灯光在中场休息时亮起，芬恩转向詹姆斯·切斯并说，“我想我要错过丽贝卡。我记得这两个中这是更好的一个，即使这个也开始显现出它的老态。所有这些关于他们两个在一起是如何神奇的废话。在我看来一点也不神奇。在朱莉娅·罗伯茨的时代，英格丽·伯格曼让我安心地活着。”

source: Finn , still holding his book , rolled his wrist to check his watch . Ten after four , which of course had no bearing on the question . " I told ' em all six o'clock , " he said . " I hate this malarkey where you have one coming at six o'clock and one at six-fifteen and so forth . " It was endearing that anyone could still get the willies from Edgar Allan Poe .
domestication: 芬恩仍然拿着书，扭了扭手腕看了看表，四点十分，当然，这跟问题毫无关系。“我跟他们说都是六点钟，”他说，“我讨厌这种胡闹，有人六点钟来，有人六点一刻来，没完没了。”看到有人还能被埃德加·爱伦·坡的作品吓得心惊胆战，真是令人感到亲切。

source: What he 'd come up with was a film about the makers of gay porno films . Which , if it worked -- if he could get the time and the funding and of course the access -- would be a sort of oblique self-portrait in addition to whatever else . His films had always been about subcultures : American Indians who worked building skyscrapers , a leprosarium in what was then Southern Rhodesia , country-music fans . The children and their street games . But a subculture based on being homosexual and making films : how could this not end up being his best work ? Or so he thought sometimes .
domestication: 他想拍一部关于同性恋色情片制作者的电影，如果能成的话——如果他有足够的时间和资金，当然，还需要获得许可——这将是一种间接的自画像，除了别的意义之外。他的电影总是关于亚文化：在摩天大楼上工作的美国印第安人，当时南罗得西亚的一个麻风病院，乡村音乐迷，以及孩子们和他们的街头游戏。但一个基于同性恋和拍电影的亚文化：这怎么可能不成为他最好的作品呢？或者他有时候会这么想。

" Would you make a movie about welfare cheats eating watermelon in their Cadillacs ? "

source: That was when James had first moved in . He 'd gone down to the city for a weekend to pick up the rest of his things and the weekend had lasted until Thursday . When Finn came to get him at the airport in Albany , James 's explanation was so carelessly thin that Finn ( who 'd had a half-carafe of vile Paul Masson red wine while waiting in the lounge ) had called him a slut .
domestication: 那是詹姆斯刚搬进来的时候。他去城市待了一个周末，收拾剩下的东西，本来应该就几天的事儿，结果一拖就是到星期四。当芬恩开车去奥尔巴尼机场接他时，詹姆斯编的理由太过牵强，弄得像个拙嘴笨舌的孩子，结果被芬恩训得狗血淋头。其实，在机场候机室里喝了半壶劣酒的芬恩，也有点儿醉意，嘴上没把门，所以才会当场骂詹姆斯是花花公子。
foreignization: 那是詹姆斯刚搬进来的时候。他下到了城市待了一个周末去捡剩下的东西，结果这个周末一直持续到星期四。当芬恩在奥尔巴尼机场接他时，詹姆斯的解释是如此的马虎，芬恩（当时在休息室等候时喝了一半卡拉夫的恶心的保罗·马松红葡萄酒）称他为荡妇。

domestication: 拜伦说：“我觉得这次我被弄得面子上下不来。”他停顿了一下，继续说，“我差点儿就大发雷霆了，差点儿就给他们打电话去臭骂一顿。当然，珍妮特还是把我劝下来了。她说：‘天哪，你想想看，他们又怎么会知道呢？’我平时在拍电影的时候，从来不用拜伦·索罗门这个名字。从来不玷污自己的大名。”拜伦一边说，一边笑了起来。他笑得很自然，没有任何苦涩的味道，这反而让芬恩感到更加沮丧。“珍妮特跟我说：‘天哪，他们又怎么会知道呢？’你还记得她的样子吧？”

' You remember the way she was . "

source: Deborah Whitley , whom Finn had seated at his left , had her golden , mostly naked back to him , leaning into her conversation with Peter Sykes . Who had filled his and Deborah 's wineglasses twice now , and was speaking too low for the rest of the table to hear . He made a fist , then stretched forth the fingers like a tenor hitting a high note . Muscles bulged in his forearm : Peter Sykes was a sculptor who 'd spent the past three months working in an auto body shop to sharpen his welding skills . Deborah Whitley laughed .
domestication: 芬恩把德博拉·威特利安排在自己左边，她却背对着他，专心地和彼得·赛克斯聊天。聊天的内容真是只有他们两个人知道，彼得已经给自己和德博拉的酒杯斟满了两次酒，他说话的声音很低，其他人根本听不到。他握紧拳头，然后伸出手指，就像男高音歌手唱到高音的时候一样。他的前臂上肌肉鼓胀，这也难怪，因为彼得·赛克斯是个雕塑家，为了提高自己的焊接技巧，最近三个月都在汽车修理厂工作。德博拉·威特利突然大笑起来。
foreignization: 黛博拉·惠特利（Deborah Whitley）坐在芬恩的左边，她那金色的、几乎赤裸的背部对着他，身体前倾，专心地与彼得·塞克斯（Peter Sykes）交谈。彼得·塞克斯已经给他和黛博拉的酒杯斟满酒两次了，他说话的声音太低，其他人都听不清楚。他握紧了拳头，然后像男高音歌手唱到高音时一样伸展开指头。他的前臂肌肉凸起：彼得·塞克斯是一位雕塑家，他过去三个月一直在汽车修理厂工作，以此来提高自己的焊接技巧。黛博拉·惠特利笑了起来。

Deborah Whitley , whom Finn had seated at his left , had her golden , mostly naked back to him , leaning into her conversation with Peter Sykes . Who had filled his and Deborah 's wineglasses twice now , and was speaking too low for the rest of the table to hear . source: Finn was still sitting in his study when he heard the car pull in . Finn was still sitting in his study when he heard the car pull in . source: It took us at least an hour to set up the tent . Justine focused the flashlight on the instructions , and I spread the materials out . The instructions were in French , probably written by Bulgarians . We were missing a pole . I found a stick in the olive orchard that tore a hole in the canvas material . We sighed and cursed . Even with our clothes on the ground as a buffer , the sleeping bags could not soften the hard and bumpy gravel , and I could n't help but think of Hindus sleeping on beds of nails , thinking they were welcome to them . I wished they were Greek .
domestication: 花了我们至少一个小时才搭好帐篷。贾斯汀用手电筒照着说明书，我则把所有材料都铺在地上。说明书是法语，可能是由保加利亚人写的。我们发现少了一根桿子。我在橄榄林里找到了一根树枝，但是它却把帆布撕了个口子。我们只好叹气和抱怨。即使把衣服铺在地上当缓冲垫，睡袋也无法让硬邦邦、坑坑洼洼的砾石变得柔软，我不禁想起印度人睡在钉子床上，他们可以随便享受。要是我们能遇到希腊人就好了。

The instructions were in French , probably written by Bulgarians . We were missing a pole . I found a stick in the olive orchard that tore a hole in the canvas material . We sighed and cursed . Even with our clothes on the ground as a buffer , the sleeping bags could not soften the hard and bumpy gravel , and I could n't help but think of Hindus sleeping on beds of nails , thinking they were welcome to them . I wished they were Greek .
花了我们至少一个小时才搭好帐篷。贾斯汀用手电筒照着说明书，我则把所有材料都铺在地上。说明书是法语，可能是由保加利亚人写的。我们发现少了一根桿子。我在橄榄林里找到了一根树枝，但是它却把帆布撕了个口子。我们只好叹气和抱怨。即使把衣服铺在地上当缓冲垫，睡袋也无法让硬邦邦、坑坑洼洼的砾石变得柔软，我不禁想起印度人睡在钉子床上，他们可以随便享受。要是我们能遇到希腊人就好了。

domestication: 我醒来时，听见一个男人用希腊语在一个女人耳边低声说着什么，女人用柔和的语调回答着“不，不”，但从他们的谈话中可以看出，这个男人正在试图说服她一切都没问题，谁也不会知道，这感觉会很好，典型的男女情话。他们身后传来餐厅里的响亮音乐声，但我知道自己并没有在做梦。这时，朱斯汀轻轻地用肘部碰了我一下，并低声问道：“你怎么能睡得这么死？”然后她问我是否愿意出去，叫他们离开。

source: He asked his parents for the down payment for a house just offbase . His next-door neighbor was a staff sergeant who encouraged the young second looey and his wife to poison the clover that swept the front lawn and to set in pale squares of greenhouse grass . " Those poor devils who lived here before , " the sergeant kept saying , " they did n't know shit about grass , poor devils "
domestication: 他向父母要钱，想在基地附近买栋房子。他隔壁的邻居是一位中士，经常鼓励这对年轻夫妇把前院里那些一片一片的三叶草都除掉，然后种上玻璃温室里的草。那个中士总是说：“前几任房主真可怜，根本不知道怎么种草，真是可惜。”

source: Some of the young officers had almost completed their three years . They had parties where people wandered around with glow-in-the-dark flowers and symbols painted on their faces . Even enlisted men came to these parties . One of them drove a white van with a big yellow peace sign emblazoned on the side . The young second lieutenant was n't so comfortable at these gatherings , although he painted FUCK on his forehead with lime-green Day-Glo and thought it was pretty funny because he forgot about it when he went on a beer run .
domestication: 有一些年轻军官几乎完成了他们的三年服役，他们会举办派对，到处都是带着发光花和脸上画着符号的人，甚至连下士也会出席其中。一名下士还开了一辆白色货车，车身侧面还贴着一个大大的黄色和平标志。相比之下，二尉就显得有些拘谨，但他也跟着众人一起在额头上用荧光绿漆写了“FUCK”，他觉得很有趣，因为在去买酒时，他居然忘了自己额头上画了东西，直到镜子里看到自己才意识到。
foreignization: 一些年轻军官几乎完成了他们的三年任期。他们举办聚会，人们带着发光的花朵和脸上的符号四处游荡。甚至连士兵也来参加这些聚会。其中一个人的白色货车侧面印有一个大大的黄色和平标志。年轻的中尉对这些集会并不感到舒适，尽管他在自己的额头上画了用青绿色荧光笔写的“FUCK”，而且觉得很有趣，因为他去买啤酒时忘记了它。

source: I close my eyes . How can you stem the tide of darkness ? The lace of her sandals was leather , dark brown . Under the sun it looks light brown as she pedals on . Before they turn , they usually signal with their hands . I did n't see her stretch hers out . 1 only saw that she moved into the wind . From the flapping of the corner of the man 's shirt she is wearing , I know there is wind . And there is no fog . But there is , there is everything , everything that has ever occurred anywhere and anytime is still there , at least it is for me . My son writes , in English , " Why have you forsaken us ? "
domestication: 我闭上眼睛，黑暗的潮流又该如何阻挡呢？她凉鞋上的鞋带是皮革的，呈深棕色，在阳光下看起来却像浅棕色，当她踩着踏板时。一般人在转弯前都会用手势提醒一下，而我并没有看到她伸出手。我只看到她迎着风走去，从男人衬衫角飞扬的样子我就知道有风，而且没有雾。但是，却似乎一切都存在，每一个曾经发生过的时刻和场景，对我来说，都还留存着。我的儿子用英文写道：“你为什么抛弃了我们？”

source: Weeks after the surgery , school starts . As part of a persuasion unit I am required to teach , I listen to five speeches about abortion in one day from my students . Pro-life . Pro-choice . It is all so convincing when the room crackles with teenage indignation and certainty . Their minds can wrap around this issue with ease . They revel in a black and white definitive authority , one I do not remember having at 14 nor at 25 . I disappear behind my desk and the responsibility of a grade book . I have been told a good teacher is impartial . And I am . With each mark of the red pen , I grow more silent . I fulfill the image the students have of me , succumbing to the one-dimensional existence they create for all teachers . In this world , I do not go to the grocery store , drink beer , swear , go to the bathroom , or have sex .
domestication: 手术后的几周，学校又开始了。作为我要教的说服性课程的一部分，我在一天内听了五篇关于堕胎的演讲。支持堕胎的，反对堕胎的。每当教室里充满了十几岁学生的愤怒和自信时，他们的论据都非常有说服力。他们能轻松地掌握这个问题，沉醉于一种非黑即白的权威感。我却不记得自己14岁或者25岁时曾经拥有过这种自信。 我渐渐消失在讲台后面，沉浸在成绩册的责任中。有人告诉我，好老师应该保持中立，我也确实做到了。每在试卷上划下红笔一笔，我就变得更加沉默。我满足了学生们对我的期望，屈服于他们为所有老师设定的单一模式。在他们眼中的世界里，我不去超市，不喝啤酒，不说脏话，不上厕所，也不谈性。
foreignization: 手术后几周，学期开始了。在我必须教授的一项说服课程中，我在一天内听了五场关于堕胎的演讲。禁绝堕胎。堕胎自由。这些都很有说服力，当教室里充满了青少年的愤怒和自信时。他们的思想可以轻松地包裹住这个问题。他们沉醉于明确的权威，这种权威是我14岁或25岁时都不记得拥有的。我消失在我的办公桌后面和成绩册的责任中。我被告知一个好的老师应该是公正的。而我是这样的。每一次红笔的标记，我变得更加沉默。我满足了学生们对我的印象，屈服于他们为所有老师创造的一维存在。在这个世界里，我不去杂货店，不喝啤酒，不骂人，不上厕所，也不性交。

Weeks after the surgery , school starts . As part of a persuasion unit I am required to teach , I listen to five speeches about abortion in one day from my students . Pro-life . Pro-choice . It is all so convincing when the room crackles with teenage indignation and certainty . Their minds can wrap around this issue with ease . They revel in a black and white definitive authority , one I do not remember having at 14 nor at 25 . I disappear behind my desk and the responsibility of a grade book . I have been told a good teacher is impartial . And I am . With each mark of the red pen , I grow more silent . I fulfill the image the students have of me , succumbing to the one-dimensional existence they create for all teachers . In this world , I do not go to the grocery store , drink beer , swear , go to the bathroom , or have sex .

" Bad news , as if the media had n't told us already . Phone lines are jammed , offices are swamped . The Post is reporting the IRS has given up processing , that appeals automatically get the status rescinded . It 's a disaster . '

source: " Picks people randomly . " The President turned to watch the budding trees outside the Oval Office windows . " Stupidity is n't the worst drag on democracy . Indifference is . If people who ca n't be bothered to rouse themselves in their own defense take a hit in the wallet , that 's the least they deserve . If the rest get galvanized out of their less pervasive complacencies , well , it 's worth it to bear a little of their wrath . But that does n't leave this room , understand ? Not until April sixteenth , anyway . "
domestication: 他随手抓人，是吧？总统转头看着奥瓦尔办公室窗外逐渐长出的树苗，说道。“愚蠢并不是阻碍民主的最大绊脚石，冷漠才是。如果人们懒得为自己辩护，最终吃点亏，那也算是活该。如果其他人因此警醒过来，摆脱自满情绪，那么即使我们承受一些他们的怒火，也是值得的。但是，这件事就到此为止，明白吗？至少在四月十六日之前，不要让它传出去。”
foreignization: “随机地选择人们。”总统转过头去看着椭圆形办公室窗外刚萌芽的树。“愚蠢并不是阻碍民主的最糟糕的事情。冷漠才是。如果那些懒得为自己辩护的人们损失了一些钱，那么他们理应得到的就是这一点。如果其他人因为少一些自满而被激发出来，这也值得忍受一点他们的愤怒。但是这些话不出这间屋子，明白吗？至少在四月十六号之前不会。”

source: I took a job at a video store in a little mini-mall near the lake , some five miles down the shore from my mother 's cabin . When I was a child , it was simply a gas station and convenience store which sold canned goods and bait . But over the years , it had expanded ; now , in addition to the video store , there was souvenir " shoppe , " a McDonald 's , and a Domino 's Pizza . It irritated me , a little . I spent my days feeling scornful and superior to the kinds of movies most people rented .

我在湖边大约五英里处的一个小型购物中心的一家视频租赁店里找了份工作，我的母亲的小木屋就位于湖边。当我还是个孩子的时候，那儿只是一个加油站和便利店，出售罐头食品和鱼饵。但是这些年来，它扩建了；现在除了视频租赁店外，还有纪念品店，麦当劳和多米诺披萨店。这让我有点恼火，我想，“他们”正在接管这片湖泊，虽然我不知道“他们”是谁——大概是新搬来的居民吧。我花了大量时间，对大多数人租的电影类型感到鄙视，并且觉得自己比他们优越。

source: At the time , this weird juxtaposition , her insistence on switching to the mundane , seemed like pure irony . Sometimes I thought that she was so repressed that she was more or less blank on the inside-or , at very best , one-dimensional , her consciousness a space where simple commands were given and executed : " Eat . Sleep . Make food for offspring . Sleep again . " Perhaps an occasional emotion or idea would flutter through , briefly , and then disintegrate . If anyone could fail to be curious about this horrific event , it was my mother .
domestication: 那时，我觉得母亲这种奇怪的性格，非要从惨剧中转移话题，似乎很讽刺。有时候我甚至觉得她被压抑得太厉害，以至于内心变得空白，或者说，她的思想世界只有一维，脑海里只有简单的命令在执行：“吃饭，睡觉，为孩子做饭，然后再睡觉。”也许偶尔会有情绪或想法在脑海中闪现一下，但马上就会消失。要是有人能对这惨绝人寰的事件不感兴趣，那非我母亲莫属。
foreignization: 当时，这种奇怪的并列，她坚持转向平凡的事物，似乎是纯粹的讽刺。有时候我认为她被压抑得如此厉害，以至于她在内心几乎一片空白，或者说，她最多也只是单一的，她的意识是一个简单的命令被发出和执行的地方：“吃饭。睡觉。为后代做饭。再次睡觉。”也许偶尔会有一种情绪或想法短暂地闪现，然后瓦解。如果有人能对这件恐怖的事情毫不好奇，那就是我的母亲。

source: I walked down to the site of the accident and examined it for myself . Here was the place where the car had inexplicably gone off the road . They must have been going fast down that curving dirt road-in the dark , one would assume , though no one knew . They had to have been going so fast that the young , man-high saplings did n't slow them down . They flew over an embankment-since surely , if the tires had hit the strip of sand between the low cliff and the water , they would have stopped , merely bogged down in an unpleasant but eventually hilarious situation . Somehow , the car sailed over the sand . It hit the water and sank . The lake was shallow for several yards before it dropped off swiftly . Somehow , the car got past that , too .
domestication: 我走到事故现场，亲自察看了一番。这就是那辆车无缘无故偏离公路的地方。他们肯定是在那条弯曲的土路上疾驰而行的，在黑暗中，这是可以想象的，虽然没人知道到底是怎么回事。他们开得太快了，以至于那些年轻的树苗也没能减慢他们的速度。他们飞过了路堤——如果轮胎撞上了低悬崖和水之间的沙地带，他们就应该停下来了，只是陷入一个令人不愉快但最终很搞笑的情况。然而，汽车不知怎么地越过了沙地，撞入水中，沉了下去。湖水在几码远的地方逐渐变深。但不知怎么的，汽车也越过了那个地方。
foreignization: 我走到事故现场并亲自检查了那里。这就是汽车在那里莫名其妙地驶离道路的地方。他们一定是在那条黑暗的弯曲土路上以很快的速度行驶——人们会这样假设，尽管没人知道这一点。他们一定开得足够快，以至于那些像男人一样高的小树苗没有减慢他们的速度。他们飞过了一道堤坝——因为如果轮胎撞击了低悬崖和水之间的沙带，他们就应该停下来，只是陷入一个不愉快但最终令人捧腹大笑的情况中。然而不知怎么的，汽车飞跃过了那片沙地。它撞击水面并沉入水底。湖水在几码的距离内很浅，然后陡峭地下降。不知怎么的，汽车也越过了那里。

Somehow , the car sailed over the sand . It hit the water and sank . The lake was shallow for several yards before it dropped off swiftly . Somehow , the car got past that , too .

source: " Do you want some soup ? " my mother asked , as if I were a customer . Looking back , I wish that I 'd gone about finding answers in a more systematic way . I do n't even know if " answers " were what I was looking for at the time . Mostly , I was thinking of myself-where would I be at thirtytwo , forty-five , fifty-five ? How did people go about falling in love , getting married , having jobs , families , living their lives ? I wanted to frame my parents ' lives like scripts-plot , conflict , motivation , theme-anything that could be easily analyzed , anything that might give me a clue about how to proceed , or how not to .
domestication: " 你想喝些汤吗？" 我妈问我，就像我是她的客人一样。 回想起来，我希望自己当时能更有条理地寻找答案。但是，我甚至不知道自己当时到底在寻找什么答案。 大部分时候，我只是在想自己——三十二岁、四十五岁、五十五岁的时候，我会在哪里？人们是怎么谈恋爱、结婚、工作、建立家庭、过日子的？ 我想把父母的生活编成剧本，包括情节、冲突、动机、主题，任何可以轻松分析的东西，任何可能给我提供如何前进或如何避免某些事情的线索。 我其实就是想了解，他们是怎么做到这一点的，他们是怎么过出自己人生精彩的。 可是，很多事情，并不是我们想得那样的简单。 人生就像一碗汤，复杂而且混乱，我们能做的，就是一口一口地喝下去，慢慢品味，细细感受。

" Do you want some soup ? " my mother asked , as if I were a customer . Looking back , I wish that I 'd gone about finding answers in a more systematic way . I do n't even know if " answers " were what I was looking for at the time . Mostly , I was thinking of myself-where would I be at thirtytwo , forty-five , fifty-five ? How did people go about falling in love , getting married , having jobs , families , living their lives ? I wanted to frame my parents ' lives like scripts-plot , conflict , motivation , theme-anything that could be easily analyzed , anything that might give me a clue about how to proceed , or how not to .

" 你想喝些汤吗？" 我妈问我，就像我是她的客人一样。 回想起来，我希望自己当时能更有条理地寻找答案。但是，我甚至不知道自己当时到底在寻找什么答案。 大部分时候，我只是在想自己——三十二岁、四十五岁、五十五岁的时候，我会在哪里？人们是怎么谈恋爱、结婚、工作、建立家庭、过日子的？ 我想把父母的生活编成剧本，包括情节、冲突、动机、主题，任何可以轻松分析的东西，任何可能给我提供如何前进或如何避免某些事情的线索。 我其实就是想了解，他们是怎么做到这一点的，他们是怎么过出自己人生精彩的。 可是，很多事情，并不是我们想得那样的简单。 人生就像一碗汤，复杂而且混乱，我们能做的，就是一口一口地喝下去，慢慢品味，细细感受。

source: It was a choice between the newspaper I had worked on for 24 years and my cat . I chose my cat and left the collective . But in the next few days , someone stole my cat anyway and left me with this other cat . It was a fairly nice cat , but not as sweet as mine . I worried that it might be an altered male and that if I took it to the vet for shots , the vet would charge me with passing off a false cat as mine and take it away from me . I could never tell when food would be drugged , so I ate as little as possible and drank as little as I could . source: The worst drugs were the ones that made me hardly able to speak . Just before collective meetings , I 'd be given drugs so I could n't be coherent and tell the collective what was happening , in case any of them still were their real selves . source: But the doctor wanted to hospitalize me . I begged Karla to take me home . When the doctor left the room , Karla said she thought I needed an anti-psychotic drug ! Some friend . source: I had to go to a psychiatrist , a woman this time . I had to take drugs , which scared the shit out of me , but I was afraid that the FBI would check my blood and find out if I did n't take them . If the drugs ruined my mind , I could stop taking them , as long as I could keep out of the hospital .

source: Then my friends and the psychiatrist wanted me to go to a psychiatric day care program . The majority of the patients were supposed to be poor people on Medicaid , but they were too articulate , nice , and thoughtful to be real poor , mentally ill people . source: I hated the idea of drugs affecting my mind . I would never take valium when I was distraught or grief-stricken , as some of my friends did . I believed , I am sure correctly , that doctors in patriarchal society drug many women unnecessarily . And I had seen my mother given strong drugs when she had Alzheimer 's , and it broke my heart .
domestication: 我一直对麻醉品的影响持反对态度，不喜欢让它们控制我的大脑。每当我心情低落或陷入痛苦时，我都不会服用地西泮，这与我的一些朋友不同，他们却依赖这些药物来缓解情绪。根据我的观察，在父权社会里，有些医生会过度开药给女性，我相信我的看法是正确的。这让我想起了母亲患阿尔茨海默症的时候，医生给她开了很强效的药物，看到她那样子，我的心都碎了。
foreignization: 我讨厌这样一种想法，药物会影响我的思维。我从来不会在我感到痛苦或伤心时服用地西泮，就像我的一些朋友所做的那样。我相信，我肯定是正确的，在父权社会里，医生不必要地用药物麻痹了很多女性。而且我也看到过，当我母亲患上阿尔茨海默症时，给她吃了很强效的药，这让我心碎。

source: I am taking one milligram of ris-perdal , an anti-psychotic , and 50 milligrams of zoloft , an anti-depressant , a day . I give these doses -- which are considered very low -- because I believe it is important to take the lowest possible dose , and I want anyone who might be in a similar situation to know what worked for me .

source: ( My latest news is that I might be getting some of my supervisory responsibilities back , which is good and appropriate . source: Also , being with people who I now realize really were much poorer than I make me see the world differently . One woman had to wait a month to get the new eyeglasses she needed . Others depended on food stamps . One woman , a worker in college dorms , had gotten in trouble because she warned cleaning people to stay out of a room with lice because they had not been told the proper way to clean it without picking up lice themselves . One man had been destitute and alcholic , living on the street . Some heard voices telling them what to do . Yet these were kind , insightful people , who told their stories to help us all as well as themselves . One man who wanted to kill the supervisor who had gotten him fired was particularly insightful in the comments he gave others about our problems .
domestication: 而且，我现在意识到和那些比我更贫穷的人在一起，让我以不同的方式看待这个世界。有一个女人需要等一个月才能拿到她需要的新眼镜。其他人依靠食物券生活。一位女性，在大学宿舍工作，因为她提醒清洁工不要进入有虱子的房间，结果惹上麻烦，因为他们没有被告知如何正确清洁以避免自己感染虱子。一位男人曾经是无家可归的酒鬼，住在街头。有些人听到声音告诉他们该怎么做。然而，这些人很善良，很有见地，他们分享自己的故事，不仅帮助了自己，也帮助了我们所有人。有一位想要杀死解雇他的人的主管，但他对我们的问题给出了特别有见地的评论。
foreignization: 此外，和那些现在我才意识到比我更贫穷的人在一起，让我以不同的方式看待世界。一位女性不得不等待一个月才能得到她需要的新眼镜。其他人依赖食品券。一位女性，在大学宿舍工作，因为她警告清洁人员远离有虱子的房间而惹上麻烦，因为他们没有被告知如何正确清洁而不让自己被虱子叮咬。 一名男子曾经是流浪汉和酒精中毒者，生活在街头。有些人听到了告诉他们该做什么的声音。然而，这些人很善良，很有洞察力，他们分享自己的故事是为了帮助我们所有人，也帮助自己。 一位想要杀死让他被解雇的主管的男子，在对我们的问题发表评论时特别有洞察力。

source: They each had a clever one-liner , as if she were n't even in the room , like in a Chekhov play . Woody , dead in Allabeena , had lived out his life oblivious of such frivolous , phoney games . Nan was still amazed that , years ago , she had actually married a sparkling talker like these , but she had quickly tired of him . Finally , " What 's going to happen to that money of Woody 's ? "

source: Woody was obviously looking for someone to join him there , and Nan might seem a good candidate , coming as she did from a family that had produced preachers . Being much younger also helped , and she had no children . In his innocence , Woody would assume he had done his homework . After all , women were simple , agreeable creatures-just there , like the ether of his world .
domestication: 伍迪明显是在找人陪他一起去，但南娜似乎是一个不错的候选人，因为她来自一个出了很多牧师的家庭。再加上年轻，也没有孩子，这一切都让伍迪认为自己已经做了充分的准备。他天真地以为，女人都是些简单、随和的生物，就像他世界里的常规一样。不用操心，也不用费脑子。这些特质在伍迪看来，让南娜成了一个合适的人选。

source: As they stopped in front of Benny 's house , she made her speech . " Woody , I appreciate all the attention you have paid me , but I think I ought to tell you that I can never give up my independence . I 'm glad to be friends with you , but we can never be anything more than friends . " He did n't say anything , did n't say he was disappointed , did n't try to rescue his pride . After a minute , he smiled and squeezed her hand .

source: In March , just as Nan was finishing her exams , Benny 's son called . Benny had had a heart attack and was in the hospital . Maybe she should come right on . Nan completed her grades , packed , and drove to Mississippi . She went directly to the hospital and found to her relief that Benny was out of danger . Still , she visited with Benny 's family in the waiting room most of the next day and kept a close watch on Benny 's condition . Finally she called Mr. Griffin late in the day . He had been trying to get her , and in fact he needed her on the stand the very next morning . Nan saw that , this way , she would have no time to question anyone about what had transpired in the trial .
domestication: 三月份，南安刚刚完成考试，班尼的儿子就打来了电话，说班尼突发心脏病已经住院了。南安赶紧收拾行李，驱车前往密西西比州，一路上满是担忧。到达医院后，她松了一口气，看到班尼的状况已经脱离危险。尽管如此，她仍然在医院等候室里陪伴着班尼的家人，时刻关注着班尼的病情。直到晚上，她才联系上了格里芬先生，原来他一直在找她，需要她第二天早上出庭作证。南安意识到，如果这样，她根本没有时间去询问任何关于审判的细节。
foreignization: 三月，就在南完成考试的时候，贝尼的儿子打来了电话，贝尼心脏病发作，被送到了医院，也许她应该直接过去。南完成成绩，收拾行李，开车去了密西西比州。她直接去了医院，并松了一口气地发现贝尼已经脱离了危险。尽管如此，她在接下来的大部分时间里还是和贝尼的家人呆在候诊室里，并一直密切关注贝尼的情况。最后，她在当天晚些时候打电话给格里芬先生。他一直试图联系她，事实上，他第二天早上需要她出庭作证。南看到，这样，她将没有时间询问任何人关于审判中发生了什么。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In March , just as Nan was finishing her exams , Benny 's son called . Benny had had a heart attack and was in the hospital . Maybe she should come right on . Nan completed her grades , packed , and drove to Mississippi . She went directly to the hospital and found to her relief that Benny was out of danger . Still , she visited with Benny 's family in the waiting room most of the next day and kept a close watch on Benny 's condition . Finally she called Mr. Griffin late in the day . He had been trying to get her , and in fact he needed her on the stand the very next morning . Nan saw that , this way , she would have no time to question anyone about what had transpired in the trial .

Still , she visited with Benny 's family in the waiting room most of the next day and kept a close watch on Benny 's condition . Finally she called Mr. Griffin late in the day . He had been trying to get her , and in fact he needed her on the stand the very next morning . Nan saw that , this way , she would have no time to question anyone about what had transpired in the trial .

source: spill from him on her behalf He buys her a bag of anise-flavored candies from the kiosk inside the Egyptian spice market . He loves the way the vials of scented oils from a stall farther in smell on her wrist and asks from time to time if he may hold her hand , which he then turns over and presses to his face so that the hint of patchouli , or sandalwood , or rose water , or the heady concoctions called harem or gypsy waft through his imagination , though she 's right there in person of course , even if her mind wanders .
domestication: 他替她倾诉衷情。他从埃及香料市场的亭子里给她买了一袋茴香味糖果。他喜欢从里面一个摊位的香气扑鼻的小瓶香水在她手腕上散发出的气味，时不时问她是否可以牵她的手，然后把手翻过来贴在脸上，让檀香、沙尔木或玫瑰水，甚至叫做后宫或吉普赛的浓郁香气钻进他的脑海，虽然她当然就在他身边，即使她的心神游移。他一边闻着这些气味，一边沉醉其中，就像活生生的画卷一样展现在他眼前，催动他的思绪，这种感觉确实让人陶醉。
foreignization: 他替她从一家商店里买了一袋茴香味的糖果，这家商店位于埃及香料市场的里面。他喜欢来自摊位上香水味的瓶子放在她手腕上的气味，并且会问她是否可以牵她的手，他然后将她的手翻过来并按在他的脸上，这样，洋甘菊、檀香或玫瑰水的气味，或是被称为后宫或吉普赛的香气充满他的想象力，尽管她当然就在他的身边，即使她的心思已经游离。

source: " In a state of constant political precariousness , in a conflict whose only end is violence , certain freedoms we can not allow ourselves , " their driver allegorized on the way from the underground cisterns to the French Embassy at the head of the street where they want to walk . " Certain expressions we can not permit . " He stared at Yara in the rearview mirror . He tooted his horn and blinkered like Turkish drivers do in traffic .
domestication: 在这样动荡不安的政治局势中，暴力冲突无休无止，我们不得不谨慎行事，某些自由是我们无法承受的。司机边开车边说，他们正从地下蓄水池开往街头的法国大使馆。这种情况下，有些言论是不能随便说的。他边通过后视镜瞥了坐在后座的亚拉一眼，边按喇叭，然后像土耳其司机一样在交通中频繁地闪烁车灯。
foreignization: “ 在一个动荡不定的政治状态中，在一场唯一的结局就是暴力的冲突中，我们不能允许自己拥有某些自由，”他们的司机在从地下蓄水池到法国大使馆的路上使用隐喻，他所说的路是他们想要散步的那条街的头部。“我们不能允许某些表达方式。”他用后视镜盯着亚拉。他按响了喇叭，并像土耳其司机在交通中那样闪烁。

“ 在一个动荡不定的政治状态中，在一场唯一的结局就是暴力的冲突中，我们不能允许自己拥有某些自由，”他们的司机在从地下蓄水池到法国大使馆的路上使用隐喻，他所说的路是他们想要散步的那条街的头部。“我们不能允许某些表达方式。”他用后视镜盯着亚拉。他按响了喇叭，并像土耳其司机在交通中那样闪烁。

source: Yara had given the American man a celadon green cut velvet scarf that had been made for her by an artist in the city where she lives . The scarf hung over his bed and he burned it when she told him she was leaving for Istanbul . She had written him letters , between phone calls , between the times they 'd been together , which he also burned . She gave him an ivory carving of a fist that had at one time been a snuff box . The hand reminded her of his . When he came to Chicago to see her she placed it in his hand , which closed immediately around it . He studied her face , as if he were unaccustomed to receiving gifts , and then opened his fingers and memorized the small carving carefully before putting it in his pocket , with his knife and money clip . Between the cracks of the fingers , delicate black lines . You can see the suggestion of jealousy in the grip .
domestication: 亚拉送给那个美国人的青绿色天鹅绒围巾，是城里的一位艺术家专门为她制作的。那条围巾一直挂在他的床上，直到她告诉他她要去伊斯坦布尔，他才把它烧了。她还给他写过信，在打电话和他们相处的空闲时刻，他也把那些信都烧了。她送给他一个象牙雕刻的小拳头，那曾经是一个鼻烟盒。那个手势让她想起了他的手。当他来芝加哥看她时，她把小拳头放在他的手里，他的手立即紧握住了它。他研究着她的脸，就像他不习惯接受礼物一样，然后张开手指仔细地记下那件小雕刻，然后把它和他的刀子、钱夹一起放进了口袋。手指缝隙间，有着细致的黑线，你能从握紧的样子中看到一丝嫉妒的意味。
foreignization: Yara曾给这位美国人一条青绿色天鹅绒围巾，由她所居住的城市的一位艺术家专门制作。 这条围巾挂在他的床上，当她告诉他自己将离开去伊斯坦布尔时，他把它烧了。 她给他写过信，在打电话的间隙，在他们在一起的时间里，他也把这些信烧了。 她送给他一个象牙雕刻的拳头，这曾经是一盒鼻烟盒。 这只手让她想起了他的手。 当他来芝加哥看她时，她把它放在他的手中，他的手立即紧握住了它。 他凝视着她的脸，仿佛他不习惯接受礼物，然后张开手指，小心翼翼地记下小雕像后才把它放进口袋里，和他的刀子还有钱夹放在一起。 手指缝隙中有细小的黑线， 你可以从握持中看到嫉妒的迹象。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Yara had given the American man a celadon green cut velvet scarf that had been made for her by an artist in the city where she lives . The scarf hung over his bed and he burned it when she told him she was leaving for Istanbul . She had written him letters , between phone calls , between the times they 'd been together , which he also burned . She gave him an ivory carving of a fist that had at one time been a snuff box . The hand reminded her of his . When he came to Chicago to see her she placed it in his hand , which closed immediately around it . He studied her face , as if he were unaccustomed to receiving gifts , and then opened his fingers and memorized the small carving carefully before putting it in his pocket , with his knife and money clip . Between the cracks of the fingers , delicate black lines . You can see the suggestion of jealousy in the grip .

source: " I love marriage , " she says suddenly , which is diversionary-something she heard another woman say-and too bland to mean anything , and probably especially not I love being married to you . There are ways other than small favors to try love . Willful declarations . And travel is a way to try , as is a move , or for some having a child . There are private ways that involve trying to forget . She ca n't remember , right this minute for instance , the exact date she met him , the city his last letter was mailed from , where she was standing in the picture he made of her . Raki helps forget . The waiter pours three fingers in a tall glass and when she adds water , the liquid turns white .
domestication: 她突然说：“我爱婚姻”，听起来像是在转移话题，这句话可能是她从别处听来的，而且太过平淡，没有什么特别的含义，更可能的意思并不是“我爱和你结婚”。除了小恩小惠之外，还有其他方式可以尝试爱情，比如坚定的宣言。旅行也是一种尝试，搬家也是，对有些人来说，生孩子也是。还有些私密的方式，就是试图遗忘。她现在无法回忆起自己与他相遇的确切日期，他最后一封信的寄出城市，以及他给她拍照时她的站姿。喝拉基酒有助于遗忘。服务员倒了三指的拉基酒在一个高玻璃杯里，当她加上水时，液体变成了白色。
foreignization: “ 我爱婚姻， ”她突然说，这是一种转移注意力的说法——她听另一个女人这么说过——而且太平淡了，没有什么意义，可能尤其不意味着我爱和你结婚。除了小恩小惠，还有其他方式来尝试爱情。任性的宣言也是如此。旅行是一种尝试的方式，搬家也是，对有些人来说生孩子也是。有涉及尝试忘记的私人方式。她现在记不起来，比如，她遇见他的确切日期，他最后一封信是从哪个城市寄出的，在他拍的她的照片中她站在哪里。拉基可以帮助忘记。服务员在一个高玻璃杯里倒了三指宽的量，当她加水时，液体变成白色。

There are private ways that involve trying to forget . Raki helps forget . The waiter pours three fingers in a tall glass and when she adds water , the liquid turns white .

domestication: 接下来，音乐家们围成一圈站在桌子旁，每人手持乐器，有手鼓，有一个腰圆似西葫芦的十二弦琉琴，还有一支长长的，似乎要将气吹没了的单簧管。他们演奏时使用他们特有的四分音阶，当然不会演奏什么情歌，而是演奏苏莱曼大帝的辉煌，演奏穆罕默德飞升七重天的故事，听起来倒像是在诉说灵魂的饥饿。
foreignization: 接着，音乐家们围绕着他们的桌子形成一个圆圈，带着他们的乐器——一只手持鼓，一把腰部凸起的有十二根弦的琉特琴，一支长长的、无休止的单簧管。他们演奏着，以他们独特的四分音，不是浪漫的歌曲，当然不是，而是苏莱曼大帝的宏伟，穆罕默德进入七重天的旅程，听起来像是关于精神饥饿的歌曲。

接着，音乐家们围绕着他们的桌子形成一个圆圈，带着他们的乐器——一只手持鼓，一把腰部凸起的有十二根弦的琉特琴，一支长长的、无休止的单簧管。他们演奏着，以他们独特的四分音，不是浪漫的歌曲，当然不是，而是苏莱曼大帝的宏伟，穆罕默德进入七重天的旅程，听起来像是关于精神饥饿的歌曲。

source: Yara and Anshe have been traveling together for over a month now , in and around Istanbul , city of new beginnings forced on one people by another . Travel is a world of comfortable shoes and phraseology . It involves the fair and unfair exchange of currency , gestures of strangeness , hospitality . It is meant to trigger , at the end of the road , a longing for home . On their way out of the restaurant , after they have finished drinking the lion 's milk , a young man wearing a bright red vest shakes lemon scented water into their hands to splash onto their faces . She is certain it is a ritual meant to carry them together into the eternal future , like throwing rice at a bride and groom .
domestication: 亚拉和安谢已经一起旅行一个多月了，在伊斯坦布尔城里四处游荡，这是一座被迫让人们重新开始的城市。旅行就像穿着舒适的鞋子和背诵一些必要的短语一样简单。它包括公平或不公平的货币兑换，陌生人的手势，以及好客的态度。旅行的意义在于，当你走到路的尽头时，你会产生对家的思念。在他们离开餐厅之后，喝完了所谓的“狮子奶”（一种土耳其的啤酒），一个戴着鲜红马甲的年轻人朝他们的手上洒了一些柠檬味的水，让他们可以将水泼到脸上。亚拉确信这是一个仪式，目的是为了让他们一起步入永恒的未来，就像在新婚夫妇面前抛洒米饭一样，这是一种祝福的象征。
