It is now test time . I am exhausted . Jim passes out the test . By now he has told us all the questions and answers . Some of us have taken notes which we can keep out during the test . Under these conditions , anyone can pass it . Jim leaves the room . When he returns , he corrects the papers . Everyone has passed . In a few minutes , we will all have our certificates . The day is over , we say goodbye , and I drive home to the Berkshires .
唉，现在该考试了，我已经筋疲力尽了。吉姆发下试卷，到现在为止，他已经告诉我们所有的问题和答案。我们有些人记下了笔记，可以在考试时都打开来看。在这样的条件下，谁都会轻而易举地通过。吉姆走出房间，一会儿后回来批改试卷。结果大家都过关了。再过几分钟，我们每个人就会拿到合格证。今天就结束了，我们互相告别，我开车回到伯克希尔斯家。

The day is over , we say goodbye , and I drive home to the Berkshires .

source: The following week , I set out for the police station to apply for a gun permit . There was a chill in the air , snow predicted for the next day . I walked up through the basketball courts , past the red plastic jungle gym , and noticed a toy sign Ambulance affixed to it . How odd to have a sign implying calamity in a children 's playground . I rehearsed what I would say to the Chief of Police when he interviewed me . Jim had said that when we applied for a Class A Unrestricted Permit , we would have to make a strong case for why we needed a handgun for self-protection more than the average citizen . Because I took the course to qualify , I wanted to apply .

source: In a bit of a fog , I wandered into Town Hall , then realized it was the wrong place . So down the hill I went , to the Police Station . Gun permit forms were piled up in a big bin in the lobby . I picked one up and a kindly woman led me through the process of filling out the application . Then she helped me look up addresses for my two references . Jim had said the police just stash your references in your file . They dig them out only if you get yourself into trouble .
domestication: 迷迷糊糊地，我走进了市政厅，才发现自己走错地方了。于是，我沿着山丘往下走，去了警察局。大堂里有一个大箱子，里面堆满了枪支许可证申请表。我拿起一张，一个好心的女人带我填写申请表。然后，她还帮我查找我的两个推荐人的地址。吉姆曾经说过，警察只是把你的推荐人信息存到档案里，如果你出了问题，他们才会去查看。

source: Yesterday , driving over to Smith - Wesson with Clay , I called him my shooting buddy , then changed it to shooting teacher . " I 'm your shooting sensei , " he said with his Southern drawl . He sees shooting as a martial art with all the discipline , focus , and meditative activity such undertakings require . Later I looked up sensei .
domestication: 昨天，我和克莱开车去史密斯-威森的时候，我叫他我的射击伙伴，然后改口说他是我的射击老师。他带着南方口音，说：“我是你的射击师父。”他觉得射击就像一门武术，需要纪律、专注，还有静心的态度，就像其他武术一样。我后来查了“师父”这个词，才知道它原来这么深奥。
foreignization: 昨天，开车到史密斯-威森时，我和克莱在一起，我称他为我的射击伙伴，然后改口说成射击老师。“我是你的射击师父，”他带着南方口音这样说。他把射击看作是一种武术，需要像这样的活动所需要的所有纪律、专注和冥想活动。他认为射击需要像其他武术一样的严格训练和自律。 后来我查了“sensei”的意思。

source: Clay asks me to repeat the steps over and over . Push the lower button in to release the magazine . When the magazine slides out , hold it in your left hand and insert the ammo . One at a time , pop five shells into the magazine with your right hand . Each shell is called a round . Clay loads only five rounds at a time , although the magazine holds ten , to keep track of what he has already shot . Each time you raise your gun , you shoot a string of five rounds .
domestication: 克莱让我重复练习，总是让我先按住下面的按钮把弹匣推出来。当弹匣滑出来后，我左手握住它，开始装子弹。一颗一颗地往里面装，右手一共装五发。每一发子弹都叫一轮。克莱每次只装五发子弹，尽管弹匣可以容纳十发，因为这样他可以清楚地记得自己已经打了多少发。每次我举枪的时候，都会打出一排五发子弹。
foreignization: Clay 要求我一遍又一遍地重复这些步骤。按下下面的按钮释放弹匣。当弹匣滑出来时，用左手握住它，然后装入子弹。一次一个，右手将五个弹壳弹入弹匣。每个弹壳称为一发。Clay 每次只装五发子弹，尽管弹匣可以容纳十发，以便跟踪他已经射出的子弹。每次你举起枪，你就会射出五发子弹的连续。

source: Now that I have my gun license , now that I have spent my long day at Smith &; Wesson , now that I have been able to talk about my shooting to men on the right and wrong sides of the law , now that I 've told friends and family about all this and heard their various reactions , now that I have had the sensation of shooting a pistol , now that I have joked about using my government issued gun permit at the airport - what now ? Am I really going to learn how to shoot ? Would I pack a pistol and go hiking in the woods ? Am I going to own a gun ?
domestication: 既然我已经拿到枪支许可证了，那么接下来会怎样呢？我在史密斯威尔森公司度过了漫长的一天，跟执法人员和违法者们聊了很多关于射击的事情，我把这些事告诉朋友和家人，也听到了他们各种各样的反应，我也体验到了射手枪的感觉，我甚至开玩笑说要在机场使用我的政府颁发的枪支许可证……现在该怎么办呢？我真的会去学射击吗？我会带着手枪去深山徒步吗？我会拥有枪支吗？

source: I was n't dating then , had n't been since I got my second divorce , which was n't an actual divorce because Michelle and I had just been keeping company , we were n't married . Afterward , there were n't a lot of possibilities . After a certain age and in certain jobs , you never meet anybody . There was supposed to be a new woman at the tax office in June , but she turned out to be a he - they hired a man .

source: So I was up there playing cards one afternoon when there came this pounding on the door . The place shook . He got up and opened it and there stood Mrs. Eller , screaming , pointing down into the courtyard ; a fenced space behind the building with a small swimming pool rimmed by stones set in concrete and stocked with white iron lawn furniture .

source: The day before he left he was still swearing that Mrs. Eller had stolen his cat . We had everything ready to go , in cartons by the door , and the manager had arranged a truck for his furniture . We played a half dozen games of whist , dealing cards out on top of the cardboard boxes , and then I got up to go home .

source: The house looks inside much like Brewster 's apartment always looked - comfortable , squared away - although that may be Susan 's doing . There 's a long counter , a serving bar between the kitchen and dining room , and arrayed on top are five or six of the fabric-covered boxes that Brewster made , along with a camera and his antique pistol . " Do you want that ? " Susan asks when she notices me notice it . " Take anything you want , really . " " No , but thanks , " I say .
domestication: 这家看起来跟布鲁斯特的公寓一模一样，真的是很舒服，也很有条理，虽然这可能都要归功于苏珊。客厅和厨房之间，有一长条柜台，苏珊把五六个布面小盒子摆在上面，还有一架相机和一把古董手枪。当她发现我在看那手枪时，就问我：“你想要吗？”接着又说：“真的，你随便拿吧。”我摇了摇头，说：“不用了，谢谢。”

I feel better now , though , and glance back up at the house , at the yellow door . " Okay ? " I ask , loud . Alone . domestication: 算了，就当没事吧。它们只是猫，在沙发上乱踩，闻来闻去，从座位间穿梭，安顿下来，跳上跳下，到处找位置，全神贯注。我现在感觉好些了，抬头往回看那栋房子，黄色的门。“还好吗？”我大声问道。却只得到了沉默。启动引擎，汽车轻微地晃动了一下，我挂上档，缓慢驶出车道，驶上街面。我这一生基本上一直在和某个人说话。

source: # HANNA # ( to Casals ) Split the fences . I 'll take Cuzomano and Torena . You take the East side . Go through the tapes of who we been listening to . See if one of them was a tipster .
domestication: 韩娜对卡萨尔斯说：把围栏分开来搜索，我负责库佐马诺和托雷纳地区，你去东边看看。检查一下我们截获的通讯录，查查看谁是内部线人。韩娜转头对德鲁克说：你配合法医调查所有的物证。然后她又问波斯科：他们怎么知道货车的行驶路线和货物？盖奇公司每天都打印出当天的路线表吗？打印出来的文件怎么处理？谁负责收拾他们的垃圾？对他们的中层管理人员逐一进行调查，看看有没有人泄露了情报。（停顿）检查那三个保安，查明是否有其中一个是告密者。
foreignization: # 汉娜 # （对卡萨尔斯）分头检查围栏，我来负责库佐马诺和托雷纳，你去东边。查看我们收集到的所有录音带。（对德鲁克）在处理所有物证时与法医团队保持联系。（对博斯科）他们怎么知道货车的行程和货物？盖奇每天是否打印行程表？他们会怎么处理打印件？谁会收集他们的垃圾？调查他们的中层管理人员，看看是否有人泄露了这次行动。（停顿）检查三名保安，看看是否有内鬼。

source: # EADY ( V.O. ) # The plates are mezzotints . They evoke a feeling Japanese painters called " sabi " . They believed there were eight scenes of transcendental loneliness . They painted them over and over again . One is a flock of geese hovering over a field . There 's always mist . It 's painted just as the leader touches down .
domestication: 这是一幅梅索金版画，能唤起一种叫做“寂”（sabi）的感觉，你知道，这种感觉就像日本画家说的，里面有八种超然的孤独场景，他们总是反复描绘。比如有一幅画，画着一群鹅悬浮在田野上空，总是有雾气，领头的鹅刚好要落地，这时候整个场景就被定格住了。
foreignization: eady （旁白）# 这些版画是蚀刻版画。它们唤起了一种被日本画家称为“寂”的感觉。他们认为，有八种超然的孤独场景。他们一次又一次地描绘这些场景。其中一种场景是一群鹅悬停在田野上方。总是有雾。画面刚好捕捉到领头的鹅着陆的瞬间。

source: # CEZAR # A bank . On Thursdays it gets cash deposits for distribution to other branches . The branches have to buttress their cash accounts to handle Friday payroll checks from a Toyota and Nissan plant , a steel mill and two refineries . One day a week , Thursday , the main branch carries the full whack .
domestication: 捷萨银行是个很奇怪的地方，每周四都会收到一笔现金存款，然后再分配到其他分行，因为每周五，这些分行都得备足现金应对工资发放的高峰——丰田和日产的工厂、钢铁厂以及两家炼油厂的员工都在这个时候领工资，而每周就只有这一天，总行会承担所有压力。
foreignization: # CEZAR # 一家银行，在周四收到现金存款，以便分配给其他分支机构。这些分支机构必须补充他们的现金账户，以处理来自丰田和日产工厂、钢铁厂以及两个炼油厂的周五工资支票。一周有一天，周四，总行承担全部费用。

source: # NATE # Look , Van Zant . Nobody knew the merch was yours or they would have respected it . Be that as it may : now you get 100% from the insurance company and you 're even , plus you can get the bonds back for 60 cents onna dollar . You make an additional 40% . Your operation does n't skip a beat , and everybody 's making out .
domestication: 唉，你看，凡赞特，谁知道那些商品是你的，不然大家早就给你面子了。话虽如此，现在保险公司会全额赔付，你不但没吃亏，还能把债券以六毛钱一块的价格拿回来，再卖出去，你又能多赚四成。你的买卖依然红红火火，大家都乐得合不拢嘴，这笔生意可真划算！
foreignization: # NATE # 看，范赞特。没人知道那些商品是你的，否则他们会尊重它。不管怎样：现在你从保险公司拿到100%，你已经平衡了，而且你可以以每块1美元60美分的价格拿回债券。你额外赚取40%。你的行动不会跳过一拍，每个人都获得利益。

source: It was beastly hot weather , as Juniper remarked to Captain Lysander out on the veranda of the officers ' mess , fit for little more than an odd gin and tonic , perhaps the lazy composition of a letter home . The flies , maddening creatures that had never learned to take no for an answer , crowded around the nets that blocked the porch , searching for a way in . " I would trade a hand to be back in London , " Lysander said to Juniper after a long pause . " At least they have the decency to bar these flies from coming into the city there . "
domestication: 天气实在太热了，就像 Juniper 对营官的队长 Lysander 说的一样，他们当时站在军官食堂的阳台上，这样的天气似乎除了偶尔喝点冰镇的金酒加苏打水或是懒洋洋地写封家信之外什么事情都不能做。苍蝇，这些讨厌的生物，从来就不会听从“不”的答案，它们成群结队地围绕在挡住门廊的网子周围，寻找进来的路。过了一阵子，Lysander 对 Juniper 说：“我愿意付出一只手的代价回到伦敦。”“至少那里的人还有一点品德，不让这些讨厌的苍蝇进城。”

It was beastly hot weather , as Juniper remarked to Captain Lysander out on the veranda of the officers ' mess , fit for little more than an odd gin and tonic , perhaps the lazy composition of a letter home . The flies , maddening creatures that had never learned to take no for an answer , crowded around the nets that blocked the porch , searching for a way in . " I would trade a hand to be back in London , " Lysander said to Juniper after a long pause . " At least they have the decency to bar these flies from coming into the city there . "

source: Heading home at 5:00 p.m. after his tour had ended , he surveyed the road . The trooper didn'twrite a lot of tickets here , leaving that to the county deputies -- professional courtesy -- but he occasionally lit up somebody in a German or Italian car if he was in a mood , and this was the route he often took home at this time of day , so he knew the highway pretty well .
domestication: 快到五点钟，他结束巡逻回家了，一边开车一边打量着这条路。这位州警不常在这里开罚单，这些事通常交给县里的警察处理——这是行规，但他有时会想开玩笑地拦下开德国车或意大利车的驾驶员，条件是他高兴，而这也是他经常下班回家的路，所以对这条公路很熟悉。

Heading home at 5:00 p.m. after his tour had ended , he surveyed the road . The trooper didn'twrite a lot of tickets here , leaving that to the county deputies -- professional courtesy -- but he occasionally lit up somebody in a German or Italian car if he was in a mood , and this was the route he often took home at this time of day , so he knew the highway pretty well .
在他的巡逻结束后，他在下午 5:00 回家时，扫视了一眼道路。这名警察在这里不经常开罚单，把这件事交给了县里的警员们——这是职业上的礼貌——但如果他心情不好，有时会拦下开着德国车或意大利车的人，这也是他经常在这个时候回家的路线，因此他对这条公路很熟悉。

source: The trooper thought about removing the cross , but the mourners might return to leave another one and endanger themselves again . Best just to leave it . Out of curiosity he 'd check with his sergeant in the morning and find out what had happened . He walked back to his car , tossed his hat on the seat and rubbed his crew cut . He pulled back into traffic , his mind no longer on roadside accidents . He was thinking about what his wife would be making for supper , about taking the kids to the pool afterward .
domestication: 这位公路巡逻警想着要不要移除路边的十字架，但那些送葬的人可能会再回来竖另一个，到时候他们又会陷入危险之中。还是算了吧，权当作没看见。他出于好奇，第二天早上会问他的上司到底发生了什么事。他走回车里，把帽子随手扔在座位上，揉了揉他剃得短短的头发。重新上路后，他已经不再去想那起车祸的事，而是开始思考老婆晚上会做什么饭，还有带孩子去游泳池的事儿。
foreignization: 州警想着移除这个标志，但哀悼者可能会回来再放一个，并且再次将自己置于危险之中。最好还是就这样算了。出于好奇，他第二天早上会问他的中士发生了什么事。他走回他的车，把帽子扔在座位上，揉搓着他的平头发型。他重新开车上路，他的思绪不再是关于路边的事故。他正在想着，他的妻子晚上会做什么饭，关于晚饭后带孩子去游泳池。

The trooper thought about removing the cross , but the mourners might return to leave another one and endanger themselves again . Best just to leave it . Out of curiosity he 'd check with his sergeant in the morning and find out what had happened . He walked back to his car , tossed his hat on the seat and rubbed his crew cut . He pulled back into traffic , his mind no longer on roadside accidents . He was thinking about what his wife would be making for supper , about taking the kids to the pool afterward .

source: But none of that mattered on Amber 's wedding day . It was the most perfect October day I ever hope to see . We had made it through corsets , crinolines , upsweeps and the first big crisis of the day when they sent the white stretch limo instead of the white superstretch SUV I paid for . Amber got on the phone , turned into the Bride of Frankenstein , and thirty minutes later we had the right car .
domestication: 那天是艾伯的婚礼，其他的事都变得无关紧要了。十月的天气很好，真是美不胜收。我们已经度过了穿上紧身胸衣、裙撑和高高盘起的发髻的难关，还有当他们派来白色豪华轿车而不是我付钱的超级大型SUV时的最大危机。艾伯拿起电话，瞬间变成了“弗兰肯斯坦新娘”，三十分钟后，我们搞定了正确的车。
foreignization: 但这一切在艾伯的婚礼那天都不重要了。那是一个我曾经希望见到的最完美的十月天气。我们已经度过了紧身胸衣、裙撑、发髻和当天第一次大危机，当时他们送来了一辆白色加长轿车，而不是我付钱的超大型SUV。艾伯接起电话，变成了弗兰肯斯坦的新娘，三十分钟后，我们有了合适的汽车。

source: Anyway , my problems started the next day when I woke up , and shoulda , coulda and woulda did not stop the train wreck in my head , or keep the elephant from tap dancing across my aching body . I mean , I 'd probably had more to drink in one night than I had consumed in the last decade . My mouth felt like I 'd been sucking vintage sewer water and I wanted to call room service or 911 for an Advil and orange juice IV because I could not remember where the bathroom was or imagine dragging myself to it and trying to find the pill bottle in my toiletry bag . That would have meant I had to open my eyes . I had tried that already . The little bit of light sneaking through the drapes made me want to vomit .
domestication: 反正，我的问题开始于第二天早上醒来时，各种“本该”、“可以”和“应该”都不能阻止我脑中的灾难，也不能阻止一头大象在我疼痛的身体上跳舞。我是说，我可能在一个晚上喝了十年来最多的酒。我的嘴巴感觉就像吸了陈旧的下水道水，我想打电话叫客房服务或911送来一瓶布洛芬和橙汁静脉注射，因为我实在记不起来洗手间在哪儿，也无法想象自己爬起来去找药瓶。那样的话，我就得睁开眼睛。但我已经试过了，窗帘缝隙中透进来的微光让我只想吐。
foreignization: 无论如何，我的问题在第二天早上醒来时开始，结果应该、可以和愿望都没有阻止我脑中的火车事故，或是阻止大象在我疼痛的身体上跳舞。我是说，我可能在一个晚上喝的酒比过去十年总共喝的还多。我的嘴巴感觉就像我在喝陈年的下水道里的水，我想打电话给客房服务或911来打一剂布洛芬和橙汁静脉注射，因为我记不起来洗手间在哪里，也无法想象自己拖着自己到那里然后在我的洗漱包里找到药瓶。那意味着我必须睁开眼睛。我已经试过了。窗帘缝隙里透出的那一点点光线让我想吐。

Anyway , my problems started the next day when I woke up , and shoulda , coulda and woulda did not stop the train wreck in my head , or keep the elephant from tap dancing across my aching body . I mean , I 'd probably had more to drink in one night than I had consumed in the last decade . My mouth felt like I 'd been sucking vintage sewer water and I wanted to call room service or 911 for an Advil and orange juice IV because I could not remember where the bathroom was or imagine dragging myself to it and trying to find the pill bottle in my toiletry bag . That would have meant I had to open my eyes . I had tried that already . The little bit of light sneaking through the drapes made me want to vomit .

反正，我的问题开始于第二天早上醒来时，各种“本该”、“可以”和“应该”都不能阻止我脑中的灾难，也不能阻止一头大象在我疼痛的身体上跳舞。我是说，我可能在一个晚上喝了十年来最多的酒。我的嘴巴感觉就像吸了陈旧的下水道水，我想打电话叫客房服务或911送来一瓶布洛芬和橙汁静脉注射，因为我实在记不起来洗手间在哪儿，也无法想象自己爬起来去找药瓶。那样的话，我就得睁开眼睛。但我已经试过了，窗帘缝隙中透进来的微光让我只想吐。

Anyway , my problems started the next day when I woke up , and shoulda , coulda and woulda did not stop the train wreck in my head , or keep the elephant from tap dancing across my aching body . source: But Ron was , and now he was pointing in my direction , if you get my drift . And he had to go . " You have to go , " I said . It came out somewhere between a shriek and a question . Then I got this flash that my hair must be smushed to the side of my head , so I kind of ran my fingers through it , casually , and wrapped the blanket around me like a super-sized tortilla .
domestication: 但是罗恩却站在那里，而且他的目光正朝我这里看过来，你知道我是什么意思吧。而且他必须马上离开。“你必须走，”我说，话音中夹杂着尖叫和询问。接着，我突然想起了我的头发可能被弄得乱七八糟地贴在头的一边，所以我漫不经心地用手指梳理了一下，然后像裹超大号墨西哥玉米饼一样把毯子裹在身上。

But Ron was , and now he was pointing in my direction , if you get my drift . And he had to go . " You have to go , " I said . It came out somewhere between a shriek and a question . foreignization: 至少他现在可以行动起来了，多亏了那个愚蠢的欧洲决定让俄罗斯指挥军队的次要部队。为什么该死的他们不能把它交给那些对亚洲野心较少的人，比如法国或意大利？但是不，他们非得选择俄罗斯不可，而俄罗斯总是如此渴望黄金和土地，以至于无法预测他们的军队可能会做什么。没有命令就冲入战场，只为夺取一个有用的港口或掠夺一个城市？他们的许多士兵也只接受了半途的训练，见鬼。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

At least he could move into action now , thanks to that asinine European decision to give Russia command of the army 's secondary wing . But no , it had to be Russia , who was always so desperate for gold and land that there was no telling what their troops might do . Charge into battle without orders , just to take a useful port or loot a city ? Many of their soldiers were only half-disciplined , too , dammit .

source: " Budgets are tight and Congress is out of session-and you , sir , have no authority . " Brian sipped his lemonade again . Dammit , he was n't a soldier any more , charging up a hill with bullets whistling through his shirt . Nobody could make him do anything , especially not when this was somebody else 's responsibility . Like the rest of his family , he needed to go help his big brother .
domestication: 钱袋子越来越瘪，国会也不在议事，这使得你，先生，没有什么权威可言。布莱恩又喝了一口柠檬水。他心里暗自发誓，如今自己已经不是当年那个勇猛冲锋的战士了，子弹从他身边呼啸而过。现在没人能命令他去做这做那，尤其是当这件事根本不是他的责任的时候。和家里的其他人一样，他也需要去帮他的大哥。

source: Flower vendors hastily straightened their wares , while scared cabbies whipped up their horses and raced for safety , desperate to escape the ban on being caught in New Town by foreigners . They disappeared under the great barrel-vaulted colonnades , originally built to keep businesses above the great spring floods which regularly ripped through the entire valley , and into Old Town 's narrower , winding streets . Only the ancient floodwall protected the historic quarter , not broad avenues and squares , or deep underground drains .
domestication: 花贩子急忙收拾好商品，害怕的出租车司机赶紧驱马飞奔，拼命逃离被外国人逮住在新城的禁令。他们消失在宏伟的大跨度拱廊下，最初是为了抵御经常冲刷整个山谷的大春季洪水而建造的，现在他们径直跑进老城狭窄蜿蜒的街道。只有古老的防洪墙保护着历史街区，而不是宽阔的道路和广场，也不是深埋地下排水道。
foreignization: 花贩子赶忙整理他们的商品，而害怕的出租车司机催促马匹奔向安全，拼命逃避被外国人抓住在新城的禁令。它们消失在了大拱形柱廊下，最初是为了防止企业受到整个山谷中经常肆虐的大洪水而修建的，并进入了旧城狭窄、蜿蜒的街道。只有古老的防洪墙保护着历史街区，而不是宽阔的林荫大道和地下深沟。

source: Crimson tile rooftops marked houses and shops clinging to the crag below the Citadel . Only a few , privileged newcomers would be permitted to ascend the narrow roads cut into the Iron Mountain and journey to the ducal palace , sprawled like a sated python over the rock . Black smoke slowly spiraled into the sky behind the cathedral 's gothic spires , as it had for all the millennia since swords were first beaten out against the peak 's unyielding heart .
domestication: 在城堡脚下的悬崖上，朱红色的瓦屋顶像一块块五彩的拼布，标志着紧紧依附于山壁的房屋和商店。只有少数特权阶层的新来者被允许沿着开凿在铁山上的狭窄小路攀登，前往像一条饱食的巨蟒一样横卧在岩石上的公爵宫殿。在哥特式尖塔后面的天空中，黑烟缓缓地盘旋而起，就像千百年来，剑戟撞击不屈不挠的山峰那样，这是永恒不变的景象。
foreignization: 深红色的瓦屋顶标志着房屋和商店紧紧依附在城堡下面的悬崖上，只有少数，特权阶层的新来者被允许攀登开辟在铁山上的狭窄道路并前往公爵宫殿，像一条吃饱了的蟒蛇一样铺展在岩石上。在教堂的哥特尖塔后面，黑烟缓慢地盘旋到天空中，就像它在过去所有的千年里一直这样做的那样，从第一批剑开始被锻造在峰顶坚硬的心脏上。

Black smoke slowly spiraled into the sky behind the cathedral 's gothic spires , as it had for all the millennia since swords were first beaten out against the peak 's unyielding heart .

source: During recruiting season of his final year at Virginia , he 'd been drawn to Warfield & Stone 's reputation for shunning publicity despite its long list of front-page cases and high-profile clients , drawn to its aura of secrecy . He was also impressed by the fascination his classmates and professors had with the firm and the near-celebrity status he attained on the grounds by being the only Virginia graduate the senior partners of Warfield & Stone wanted .
domestication: 他在弗吉尼亚大学的最后一年，赶上招募新人的季节。这家沃菲尔德和斯通律师事务所虽然接手了不少头条新闻案件，客户也都是社会名流，但就是不爱抛头露面，这种低调作风反而让他挺感兴趣。他也被同学教授们对这家公司的着迷情绪所吸引，而他作为唯一一个被沃菲尔德和斯通的老板垂青的弗吉尼亚大学毕业生，在校园里也差不多成为了红人。他觉得能加入这样的公司是件挺光彩的事情。
foreignization: 在弗吉尼亚大学的最后一年招募季节，他被华尔菲尔德和斯通律师事务所（Warfield & Stone）的名声吸引，这家公司尽管有长长一份头版案件和高知名度客户清单，但却对曝光避而远之，并且他也被这家公司神秘的气息所吸引。他还对同学和教授们对这家公司的迷恋以及他通过成为华尔菲尔德和斯通合伙人中唯一一个想要的弗吉尼亚大学毕业生，在校园里获得的近似名人地位印象深刻。

He was also impressed by the fascination his classmates and professors had with the firm and the near-celebrity status he attained on the grounds by being the only Virginia graduate the senior partners of Warfield & Stone wanted .

source: Hunter stood before the polished plaintiff desk to the judge 's right , still wearing his sharp , pin-stripe suit coat despite the heat of the packed courtroom . Even though the four attorneys at the defense desk had removed their coats hours ago when the judge said it was all right to do so . For some time he 'd been gazing down at a single piece of paper lying on the desk , as though hypnotized by the typed words on it and the heavy , unique signature beneath the words . Finally he brought his dark , penetrating eyes to those of the white-haired judge .
domestication: 亨特站在法官右边的被告席前，尽管拥挤的法庭里热得难受，他仍然穿着那件笔挺的西装外套，甚至连袖扣都没解开。虽然几个小时前法官已经说可以脱掉外套了，但他还是一直穿着。四个辩护律师早就把外套脱了，丢在椅背上，光着膀子，悠闲地在座位上东倒西歪。但亨特就是不肯，依然穿着西装外套，神情严肃地站着。他已经盯着桌子上的那张纸看了很久，似乎被上面的打字文字和下面那个沉重的签名给催眠了一样。终于，他把他那双锐利的黑眼睛从纸上抬起来，锁定在白发苍苍的法官身上。他的眼睛犀利的程度让人联想到一把锋利的匕首，似乎能洞察别人的心思。
foreignization: 亨特站在法官右边的被告桌前，尽管法庭里人满为患，非常热，他仍然穿着他那件锐利的条纹西装。尽管四位辩护律师已经在法官说可以这样做的几个小时前脱掉了他们的外套。有一段时间他一直盯着桌子上的一张纸，好像被纸上的打字文字和下面沉重、独特的签名所催眠。最后，他把他那双黑暗、锐利的眼睛移向了白发法官。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Hunter stood before the polished plaintiff desk to the judge 's right , still wearing his sharp , pin-stripe suit coat despite the heat of the packed courtroom . Even though the four attorneys at the defense desk had removed their coats hours ago when the judge said it was all right to do so . For some time he 'd been gazing down at a single piece of paper lying on the desk , as though hypnotized by the typed words on it and the heavy , unique signature beneath the words . Finally he brought his dark , penetrating eyes to those of the white-haired judge .

source: It was Hunter 's father who had decided what his career would be early on in his childhood , even before Hunter really knew what a lawyer was . Robert Hunter Lee would be an attorney , his father would announce every evening as the family sat down to dinner . A New York City litigator , he 'd specify during the meal . Case closed , he 'd say over dessert . Night after night , as far back as Hunter could remember .
domestication: 亨特还是个孩子的时候，他老爸就已经给他规划好了人生道路了。每天晚上一家人坐下来吃饭时，老爸都会宣布：“罗伯特·亨特·李将成为一名律师！”边吃边说：“而且是在纽约市当律师。”说完这些后，他会拍拍手，说：“就这样定了！”这种情景在亨特的记忆中无数次上演，每到晚餐时间，这段话就像放唱片一样循环播放。

source: The judge , too , Hunter noticed . Which fit . He 'd been worried at the start of the trial that a Montana judge might make it difficult for a New York lawyer carrying a big reputation into his courtroom , but that had n't turned out to be the case at all . The man in black had been completely fair , which Hunter had found was true about most Montanans . They were tough -- because Montana was a tough place to live -- but they were fair . Which was refreshing . It might help with the size of the award , too .

“ 你确定你想坚持那个故事吗？ ” 亨特大步走向原告的办公桌和他在传唤巴赫作证之前一直盯着的那张纸。他拿起它，然后回到巴赫震惊、恐惧的表情旁，将备忘录滑进了首席运营官颤抖的手指中。 “ 你绝对确定吗？ ”

source: Then , lying on the bed , he thought about the zigzag trail he had cut across the country after leaving New York City . Up to see his sister in Albany , down to Phoenix , Arizona , to visit his mother , who had moved there from upstate New York following the death of Tony 's father . On to Las Vegas , on again , driving a few hours every day from place to place with no destination in mind , just driving with the thought that he would know it when he saw it . He had arrived in Portland , Oregon , with that vague thought still in his head and a bit of regret that he had not yet found it , a place where he wanted to stay and stop the insane driving .
domestication: 他躺在床上，回想着离开纽约市后横跨全国的曲折之路。他曾去阿尔巴尼看望姐姐，又到亚利桑那州的凤凰城探望母亲，母亲在托尼父亲去世后从纽约州北部搬到了那里。接着，他又去了拉斯维加斯，每天开车几个小时，从一个地方到另一个地方，没有明确的目的地，只是觉得到了时候就知道了。他带着这种模糊的想法来到了俄勒冈州的波特兰，还有一点遗憾的是，还没找到想要停留和终止这疯狂驾驶的地方。

On to Las Vegas , on again , driving a few hours every day from place to place with no destination in mind , just driving with the thought that he would know it when he saw it . He had arrived in Portland , Oregon , with that vague thought still in his head and a bit of regret that he had not yet found it , a place where he wanted to stay and stop the insane driving .

source: Strictly speaking , she was n't really looking at the Gulf of Mexico . Faye was n't sure how to name this water . In south Louisiana , the land just drifts to sea . The water at Faye 's feet was connected to a bunch of canals and island-dotted estuaries and grassy coves that extended south and west until they eventually connected to Barataria Bay , and it was connected to the Gulf of Mexico . Regardless of its name , this water smelled like the gulf breezes that blew in her bedroom window every morning .
domestication: 说到底，她其实不是在看墨西哥湾。菲伊不知道该怎么命名这片水域。在路易斯安那州的南部，陆地仿佛漫无目的地漂向大海。菲伊脚下这片水与众多运河、星罗棋布的岛屿、充满草丛的海湾相连，这些水域朝着南方和西方延伸，最后终于与巴塔里亚湾相连，而巴塔里亚湾又与墨西哥湾相连。不管它叫什么名字，这片水域闻起来就像每天早上从她卧室窗口吹进来的墨西哥湾海风。
foreignization: 严格来说，她并没有真正地看着墨西哥湾。菲伊不知道该如何命名这水。在路易斯安那州南部，陆地只是漂向海洋。菲伊脚下的水与许多连接到巴塔里亚湾的运河、岛屿点缀的河口和草甸小湾相连，而它又与墨西哥湾相连。不管它叫什么名字，这水闻起来都像每天早上从她的卧室窗户吹进来的海风。

Strictly speaking , she was n't really looking at the Gulf of Mexico . Faye was n't sure how to name this water . In south Louisiana , the land just drifts to sea . Regardless of its name , this water smelled like the gulf breezes that blew in her bedroom window every morning .

source: Maybe he 'd loved her and maybe he had n't , but Steve Daigle was not the kind of man who stayed around for the hard times . Justine 's diagnosis of terminal cancer would ordinarily have sent him out the door and on his way to the next parish , but not in this case . He had an inheritance to consider . Justine had owned a piece of her late father 's houseboat , not to mention a piece of a nice little pile of stock in the oil company where he 'd worked .
domestication: 也许他是爱过她的，也许他没爱过，但史蒂夫·戴格尔不是那种能在艰难时期陪伴你到底的男人。通常情况下，朱丝婷被诊断出患有绝症的消息足以让他收拾行李离开，转眼就到下一个地方去了。但这次情况有所不同，他有遗产要考虑。朱丝婷继承了她已故父亲的一部分游艇，以及一部分她工作的石油公司的股票，一笔不错的小财产啊。他有理由留下来。
foreignization: 也许他爱过她，也许他没有，但是史蒂夫·戴格尔（Steve Daigle）并不是会在困难时期留下来的那种人。贾斯汀被诊断出患有绝症，通常会让他离开这里，前往下一个教区，但这次情况并非如此。他有继承遗产需要考虑。贾斯汀拥有她已故父亲的房船的一部分，更不用说还有一部分位于他工作过的石油公司的小股票。

Maybe he 'd loved her and maybe he had n't , but Steve Daigle was not the kind of man who stayed around for the hard times . Justine 's diagnosis of terminal cancer would ordinarily have sent him out the door and on his way to the next parish , but not in this case . He had an inheritance to consider . Justine had owned a piece of her late father 's houseboat , not to mention a piece of a nice little pile of stock in the oil company where he 'd worked .
也许他爱过她，也许他没有，但是史蒂夫·戴格尔（Steve Daigle）并不是会在困难时期留下来的那种人。贾斯汀被诊断出患有绝症，通常会让他离开这里，前往下一个教区，但这次情况并非如此。他有继承遗产需要考虑。贾斯汀拥有她已故父亲的房船的一部分，更不用说还有一部分位于他工作过的石油公司的小股票。

source: After he 'd found out about that inheritance , it had taken him a while to understand why Justine could n't just go back to her hometown and kick her stepmother off that houseboat . Finally , he 'd called a cousin who 'd almost finished paralegal school , and she 'd walked him through Louisiana 's twisty inheritance laws . She 'd repeated herself until her words sank into his brain , but that did n't mean he liked those words .
domestication: 在他知道了那笔遗产之后，他花了一段时间才弄清楚为什么贾斯汀不能简单地回到她的家乡，然后把她的继母赶出那艘船。最后，他打电话给一个正在学习法律的堂妹，她向他解释了路易斯安那州复杂的继承法。她反复说明，直到他终于明白过来，但这并不意味着他喜欢这些事实。现在他知道了，贾斯汀如果想要继承那艘船，就必须按照法律程序来操作，不能简单地把人赶走。他对此很不满，但也无可奈何，只能硬着头皮去面对现实。
foreignization: 在他知道这件事的遗产后，他花了一段时间才了解为什么Justine不能回到她的家乡并把她的继母赶出那艘房船。 最终，他打电话给一个表亲，表亲几乎完成了法律助理学校的学习，她向他解释了路易斯安那州的继承法。 她反复解释，直到她的话深入他的脑海，但这并不意味着他喜欢那些话。

source: Faye 's client , a humongous environmental firm , had originally sent her to survey archaeological sites along the Mississippi south of New Orleans as part of a run-of-the-mill environmental assessment . The Deepwater Horizon disaster had exploded her routine project into a job so huge that it just might swamp her little company .
domestication: 费伊的客户是一家非常有影响力的环境公司，最初派她去沿着密西西比河对新奥尔良南部地区的考古遗址进行调查，这只是一个常规的环境评估项目。然而，深水地平线石油泄漏事故爆发后，她原来的项目一下子变成了一个非常庞大的工作量，以至于可能让她的小公司应接不暇。

Faye 's client , a humongous environmental firm , had originally sent her to survey archaeological sites along the Mississippi south of New Orleans as part of a run-of-the-mill environmental assessment . The Deepwater Horizon disaster had exploded her routine project into a job so huge that it just might swamp her little company .
Faye 的客户，一家巨大的环境公司，最初派她去调查密西西比河南部新奥尔良沿岸的考古遗址，这是常规环境评估的一部分。深水地平线事件已经使她的日常项目变成了一份如此庞大的工作，以至于它可能会让她的小公司不堪重负。

source: Others would be hurrying to assess the other aspects of the area -- the plants , the animals , the towns , the roads , the economy , the air quality , the water quality -- but Faye just needed to focus on its archaeology : the physical remnants of human history near the mouth of the Mississippi . Humans had lived here and fought over this land ever since they figured out that boats made it easy to go places and move stuff .
domestication: 别人可能会急着去评估该地区的其他方面，比如植物、动物、城镇、道路、经济、空气质量和水质，但费伊只需要关注它的考古学：密西西比河口附近的人类历史遗迹。自从人类发现船只可以让他们轻松地出行和运输东西以来，他们就一直居住在这里并为这片土地而战。
foreignization: 其他人将会赶忙评估该地区的其他方面——植物、动物、城镇、道路、经济、空气质量、水质——但费伊只需要专注于它的考古学：人类历史在密西西比河口附近的物理遗迹。自从人类弄清楚船只可以轻松地前往某些地方和运输物品以来，人类就在这里居住并为这片土地而战。

source: Chapter Two Hebert Demeray missed his old hangouts , the ones that had washed away during Hurricane Katrina . He missed the way beer bottles stuck to the tops of their bars , grimy with old shellac and spilled bourbon . Nostalgia gripped him when he remembered worn floorboards so uneven that the bathroom doors scraped and squeaked and sometimes did n't close all the way . He even missed the stench of old urinals , served by plumbing that had rebelled after years of carrying an overload of beer piss and vomit .
domestication: 第二章 海伯特·德梅雷很怀念他以前常去的那些地方，那些在卡特里娜飓风中被冲走的老店。他怀念那些啤酒瓶子粘在吧台上面的样子，满是旧的清漆和洒出的波旁威士忌。每当他回忆起磨损的木地板，地板凹凸不平，以至于厕所的门吱嘎作响，有时甚至无法完全关闭，他都会感到一阵怀旧之情。他甚至怀念旧式小便池的恶臭，那是由年久失修的管道造成的，多年来一直承载着过量的啤酒尿和呕吐物。那些旧日的气味和景象让他心生依恋，让他无法自拔。
foreignization: 第二章 海伯特·德梅雷怀念他以前的聚会场所，那些被卡特里娜飓风冲走的地方。他怀念那些啤酒瓶子粘在吧台上，满是旧的清漆和洒出的波旁威士忌的污垢。 当他回忆起已经磨损的、不平整的地板，导致厕所门刮擦和吱嘎作响，有时根本关不严时，他感到一阵怀旧之情。 他甚至怀念旧小便池散发出的恶臭，那些小便池的管道多年来承载了过量的啤酒尿和呕吐物而反抗了管道。

source: And the cheapest thing to put on top of those stilts was a premanufactured building . How on earth was a man supposed to drink enough to blot out the world when he was sitting in a double-wide ? And when that man was drinking early in the afternoon , like now ... well , the sunlight shining through the clean new windows onto the shiny new bar made the atmosphere almost too perky for total drunkenness . Almost .
domestication: 在那高架地上，最便宜的解决方案就是直接安置一个预制建筑。一个人到底怎么才能喝到忘乎所以的地步，当他坐在这么一栋平民窟里？尤其是当这人像现在这样在下午早些时候就开始喝酒时……阳光透过崭新的窗户照射在闪闪发亮的新吧台上，让整个氛围几乎变得太欢快了，难以让人完全沉浸在醉态中。几乎如此。
foreignization: 最便宜的方法是在那些桩子上面安装一栋预制房屋。一个人怎么可能喝足够多的酒来忘掉这个世界，当他坐在一栋双车位的房屋里呢？而当那个男人在下午早些时候喝酒，像现在这样……那么，透过崭新的窗户照射到闪亮的新吧台上的阳光使得整个氛围几乎过于欢快，以至于不能完全沉醉其中。差不多。

source: Hebert thought of his mother , as Cajun men will do when under the influence of booze and nostalgia . He had n't spoken to her in years , not since the last time she cursed him and cast him out . Miranda Landreneau was well able to curse a man , so he 'd never had the guts to go back and ask her forgiveness , though in all that time he 'd never lived more than ten miles from her shabby little houseboat . He 'd spent those years staggering from one rented room to another . And from one rented woman to another .
domestication: 雨尔布想起了他的母亲，就像卡津男人一样，在酒精和怀旧的影响下，总会想到自己的妈妈。他已经很多年没有跟她说话了，自从她最后一次诅咒他并将他赶出去之后。米兰达·朗德诺非常擅长对人施加诅咒，因此他从来没有勇气去求她原谅，即使这些年来，他一直住在离她那破旧的小屋船不超过十英里的地方。他花了那些年漂泊在一个又一个租来的房间里，从一个女人身边跌到另一个女人的怀抱里。
foreignization: 希伯特在酒精和怀旧情绪的影响下，想起了他的母亲，就像卡津男人通常会做的那样。他已经多年没有和她说话了，自从她最后一次诅咒他并将他赶出去之后。米兰达·兰德诺能够很好地诅咒一个人，因此他从未有勇气回到她面前乞求宽恕，尽管在那段时间里，他从未住在离她那艘破旧的小屋船超过十英里的地方。他在那些年里跌跌撞撞地从一间租来的房间搬到另一间，又从一个租来的女人身边转移到另一个租来的女人身边。

Hebert thought of his mother , as Cajun men will do when under the influence of booze and nostalgia . He had n't spoken to her in years , not since the last time she cursed him and cast him out . Miranda Landreneau was well able to curse a man , so he 'd never had the guts to go back and ask her forgiveness , though in all that time he 'd never lived more than ten miles from her shabby little houseboat . He 'd spent those years staggering from one rented room to another . And from one rented woman to another .

source: Her mom loved to tell the story about how Sasha often fell asleep while she fed her , how she had to tap the arch of her tiny bare foot to wake her . Sasha could hear her mother 's gravelly voice , see the spark in her Paul Newmanblue eyes . " You were such a tiny little bird , yet from the get-go , you were so uncommonly strong . "
domestication: 她妈妈特别喜欢讲述这样一个故事：当她给萨莎喂奶的时候，萨莎经常会睡着，她必须轻轻地拍打萨莎的小脚底才能把她唤醒。萨莎可以听到她母亲粗哑的声音，也可以看到她那双像保罗·纽曼一样蓝眼睛中的闪光。“你只是一个小小的鸟儿，但从一开始，你就表现得那么与众不同，如此的强壮。”她妈妈总是这么说。每当她妈妈提起这件事时，萨莎就会想起自己小时候的点点滴滴，心里满是温暖。她觉得，这是她和妈妈之间的一个特殊的回忆，是一种母女情感的体现。

她妈妈特别喜欢讲述这样一个故事：当她给萨莎喂奶的时候，萨莎经常会睡着，她必须轻轻地拍打萨莎的小脚底才能把她唤醒。萨莎可以听到她母亲粗哑的声音，也可以看到她那双像保罗·纽曼一样蓝眼睛中的闪光。“你只是一个小小的鸟儿，但从一开始，你就表现得那么与众不同，如此的强壮。”她妈妈总是这么说。每当她妈妈提起这件事时，萨莎就会想起自己小时候的点点滴滴，心里满是温暖。她觉得，这是她和妈妈之间的一个特殊的回忆，是一种母女情感的体现。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Every time Taylor came back to Boston on break , she was rocking some different Girls Gone Wild look . Last year she 'd dyed her hair jet black and had bangs . Tonight it was the skintight black liquid leggings , the oversized gray sheer tee over the black lace bra , the studded booties . Whereas Alexa , less adventurous , was wearing her ink skinny jeans and her tan Tory Burch leather jacket over a tank top . Okay , not as fashion-forward as Taylor , but no way was it suburban .
每次泰勒放假回到波士顿，她都有一套新的“疯狂女孩”装扮。去年，她把头发染成了乌黑，还剪了刘海。今年，她穿着一件紧身黑色液体紧身裤，一件大码灰色薄纱上衣罩在黑色蕾丝内衣外面，还有一双带铆钉的短靴。另一方面，艾莉克萨就没有那么大胆了，她穿着深色紧身牛仔裤，外面套了一件榛色的托里伯奇皮夹克和一件背心。好吧，艾莉克萨的装扮不如泰勒那样时髦，但绝对不算是土气的郊区风格。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Every time Taylor came back to Boston on break , she was rocking some different Girls Gone Wild look . Last year she 'd dyed her hair jet black and had bangs . Tonight it was the skintight black liquid leggings , the oversized gray sheer tee over the black lace bra , the studded booties . Whereas Alexa , less adventurous , was wearing her ink skinny jeans and her tan Tory Burch leather jacket over a tank top . Okay , not as fashion-forward as Taylor , but no way was it suburban .
每次泰勒放假回到波士顿，她都会呈现出不同的Girls Gone Wild风格。去年她把头发染成了深黑色，还剪了刘海。今天晚上，她穿着紧身黑色液体紧身裤，一件大码灰色半透明T恤衫套在黑色蕾丝文胸外面，脚上是带铆钉的踝靴。相比之下，爱莉克莎冒险精神较低，她穿着墨镜般的紧身牛仔裤和一件卡其色的托里伯奇皮夹克套在吊带衫外面。好吧，虽然不像泰勒那样时尚，但是绝不会让人觉得土气。

source: Alexa 's iPhone vibrated , so she took it out and read the text . A friend at some rager in Allston , telling her it was epic and she should come over . Alexa texted back sorry . Then , abruptly , she said , " Oh my God , oh my God , did I ever show you this ? " She flicked through her iPhone applications until she came to one she 'd just downloaded , launched it , held the iPhone to her mouth . When she talked into it , her words came out high pitched and weird , like one of the Chipmunks : " Hey , babe , wan na come back to my dorm and take off our clothes and do some algebra ? "
domestication: 亚历克斯的iPhone突然震动了，她拿出来一看，原来是朋友发来的短信，告诉她在奥尔斯顿某个派对上玩得很开心，让她过来一起玩。亚历克斯回复说抱歉。然后，她突然说：“我的天啊，我的天啊，我曾经给你看过这个吗？”她开始滑动iPhone的应用程序，直到找到一个刚下载的新应用，打开它，并将iPhone举到嘴边。当她对着iPhone说话时，她的话变得尖细而奇怪，像花栗鼠一样：“嘿，亲爱的，想回来我的宿舍脱掉衣服做些代数题吗？”
foreignization: Alexa 的 iPhone 震动了，她拿出来读了短信。一个在 Allston 的某个派对里的朋友告诉她这很激动人心，她应该过来。Alexa 回复说抱歉。然后，突然，她说：“我的天啊，我的天啊，我有没有给你看过这个？”她浏览她的 iPhone 应用程序，直到找到她刚下载的一个，启动它，把 iPhone 持到嘴边。当她对着它说话时，她的话语变得高音调且奇怪，就像花栗鼠一样：“嘿，宝贝，想回到我的宿舍，脱掉衣服，然后做一些代数吗？”

source: But outside the town , between Sychar and Jacob 's Well , was the sunken stone ring of a winepress . Abigail had no doubt it was there she would be stoned . Once , as a young girl , she had witnessed such a punishment . She was not supposed to be present but , being a headstrong child , had hidden in the vineyard atop the hill to watch .
domestication: 镇外，位于撒加利亚和雅各井之间，有一块下陷的石圈，看起来就像一个酒榨。在这里，亚比该尔毫无疑问会被众人石刑处死。她曾经见过这种惩罚，当时她还是个年轻女孩。她不应该在场，但作为一个任性的孩子，她还是藏在山丘上的葡萄园里偷偷观察。当时的场景仍然深深地印在她的脑海里，让她不寒而栗。她知道，如果被抓住，自己也将遭受同样的命运。
foreignization: 但是在镇外，位于 Sychar 和雅各井之间，是一个被压入地面的酒榨的石圈。亚比盖尔 毫无疑问她将在那里被石头砸死。曾经，作为一个小女孩，她见过这种惩罚。她不应该在场，但是，作为一个性格顽强的孩子，她躲藏在山丘顶部的葡萄园中去看。

source: She began another stumbling circle of grief , fear , and shame . The baby within her , responding to the violent emotional chafing , kicked vigorously . Always before , Abigail had replied to her child 's inquiries by crooning a lullaby , a love song , or a hymn of heroic deeds , like Miriam 's or Deborah 's .
domestication: 她又陷入了一轮痛苦、恐惧和羞愧的循环。子宫里的宝宝感受到母亲强烈的情绪波动，开始踢得更加用力。以前，每当孩子在她肚子里问好时，阿比盖尔总会唱摇篮曲、情歌或是像米利暗和德波拉那样讲述英雄事迹的圣歌来回应。
foreignization: 她开始了另一个跌跌撞撞的悲伤、恐惧和羞耻的循环。在她体内的婴儿，受到激烈的情感摩擦，踢得很用力。一直以来，艾比盖尔都通过哼唱摇篮曲、情歌或《米莉安》或《德伯拉》的英雄事迹赞美诗来回答孩子的问题。

source: But Abigail read the most hatred and loathing on the face of Rabbi Tabor , in the center of the trio of judges . His broad face was framed by a dirty white beard below and a swath of forehead above that continued into a balding dome . The fringe of hair around his skull stood out as if every bit of the rabbi vibrated with hostility and condemnation .
domestication: 但以实玛利看到的，最让她感到害怕的，是法官中间那位拉比塔博尔的脸。他那张宽阔的脸被一撇脏兮兮的白胡子所环绕，额头上方是一片光秃秃的头皮，似乎每一根头发都在颤抖着，散发着恶意和鄙视。他的眼睛里充满了仇恨和蔑视，整个脸都显得十分狰狞，就像一个字：不行！
foreignization: 但是，阿比盖尔在三人组法官中间的拉比塔伯的脸上读出了最大的仇恨和鄙视。他的宽阔的脸被下面一撇脏白色的胡须和上面一片额头所框住，这片额头一直延续到一个变秃的圆顶。头骨周围的头发突出地耸立着，仿佛拉比的每一部分都在振动着敌意和谴责。

His broad face was framed by a dirty white beard below and a swath of forehead above that continued into a balding dome . The fringe of hair around his skull stood out as if every bit of the rabbi vibrated with hostility and condemnation .
但是，阿比盖尔在三人组法官中间的拉比塔伯的脸上读出了最大的仇恨和鄙视。他的宽阔的脸被下面一撇脏白色的胡须和上面一片额头所框住，这片额头一直延续到一个变秃的圆顶。头骨周围的头发突出地耸立着，仿佛拉比的每一部分都在振动着敌意和谴责。

source: An elderly man , limping heavily on a crutch , arrived on the edge of Sychar 's market square just after the centurion delivered his command to stop the beating . Shorter in stature than most of the other onlookers , the newcomer approached the scene unable to determine the cause of the gathering .
domestication: 一位老人拄着拐杖，蹒跚地来到了西加的市场广场边缘。当时，百夫长刚刚下令停止打人。这位老人个子比其他围观者矮，走近现场时，还不知道大家聚集的原因。走近一看，人山人海，乱哄哄的，他摸不着头脑，也不知道发生了什么事。
foreignization: 一位拄着拐杖、严重跛脚的老人抵达了 Sychar 市场广场的边缘，就在百夫长下令停止殴打之后。与其他旁观者相比，这名新来者身材较矮，走近现场，无法确定聚集的原因。

source: My left index finger traced the shape of the little morphine bottle through the outside of my trouser pocket . Nearly two hours had passed since my last dose . Even though the pain in my right hand was tolerable and my mind was still enveloped in the delicious fuzziness of the opiate , I 'd been fighting with myself for the last fifteen minutes -- one more taste before Moretti showed ? I might not get another chance for a while . But I could n't take too much . I had to be sharp .
domestication: 我的左手食指隔着裤子口袋摸索着那小瓶吗啡的形状。距离上次服药已经过去了近两个小时。虽然右手的疼痛还能忍受，而且我的大脑仍然被鸦片的醉人感觉所笼罩，但在过去的十五分钟里，我一直在和自己较劲儿——在Moretti到来之前，再来一剂怎么样？也许过一会儿就没机会了。但是我不能太过放纵，我必须保持清醒的头脑。毕竟，前方的局面还未可知，稍有不慎就可能酿成大祸。
foreignization: 我的左手食指通过裤子口袋的外面描摹着小型吗啡瓶的形状。自从我最后一次服药已经过去了近两个小时。尽管右手的疼痛是可以忍受的，我的思维仍然被阿片的美妙朦胧感所包围，但在过去的十五分钟里，我一直在与自己作斗争——莫雷蒂到来之前再尝一口？我可能有一段时间内都不能再有机会了。但是我不能服用太多。我必须保持敏锐。

source: Movement on the sidewalk down the block caught my attention , and my hand went to the .32 tucked into my belt . I pressed farther back into the shadows of the alley , squinting at the couple who had just turned the corner . The few streetlamps that worked were dim and widely spaced , doing little to add to the meager glow spilling from the windows of the crumbling redbrick buildings .
domestication: 街区拐角处的行人路上有动静，我的手不自觉地摸向系在腰带里的那把三二口径的手枪。我往巷子的黑暗处退了退，眯着眼看着刚刚转过弯来的那对情侣。少数几盏还能亮的路灯光线昏暗，间距很大，几乎没有办法照亮那些破旧的红砖楼窗户里微弱的光线。那些光线本来就很微弱，路灯也没帮上什么忙。整个巷子被笼罩在一片诡异的黑暗之中。
foreignization: 人行道上走来的脚步声吸引了我的注意力，我的手伸向腰带里塞的.32口径手枪。我退到小巷的阴影处，眯着眼看着刚刚转过弯的那对情侣。街道上只有几盏路灯还能工作，光线很暗，而且相距很远，几乎没有增加那些破旧的红砖建筑窗户里发出的微弱光线。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Movement on the sidewalk down the block caught my attention , and my hand went to the .32 tucked into my belt . I pressed farther back into the shadows of the alley , squinting at the couple who had just turned the corner . The few streetlamps that worked were dim and widely spaced , doing little to add to the meager glow spilling from the windows of the crumbling redbrick buildings .
街区拐角处的行人路上有动静，我的手不自觉地摸向系在腰带里的那把三二口径的手枪。我往巷子的黑暗处退了退，眯着眼看着刚刚转过弯来的那对情侣。少数几盏还能亮的路灯光线昏暗，间距很大，几乎没有办法照亮那些破旧的红砖楼窗户里微弱的光线。那些光线本来就很微弱，路灯也没帮上什么忙。整个巷子被笼罩在一片诡异的黑暗之中。

For the tenth time tonight , I slipped the handkerchief back over my head and spun it around to cover my face below my eyes -- to be sure it would stay in place . If Moretti recognized me , I 'd have to kill him . I did n't want to do that . After shifting the mask around to the back again , I returned my derby to my head and settled in to wait . I needed a cigarette but restrained myself -- it would give away my position .

source: I pulled the Colt pistol from my belt and checked the load -- seven bullets I hoped I would n't need tonight . I cocked it , flicked on the safety , and stuffed it back into my belt . At one thirty I crossed the street and entered the dark stairwell . The mews of kittens came from a crate in the corner . Trickles of light filtered in from the hallway , illuminating the steps to vague dark shapes . The stair rail was sticky , the air wet , smelling of mold and sewage . Muffled voices rose and fell as I crept up to the second-floor landing . I leaned out over the rail and looked above me . No one stood guard . Moretti did n't rate his boss 's protection .
domestication: 我从腰带中拔出科尔特手枪，检查了一下弹匣——七颗子弹，我希望今晚不会用到。我扳起枪栓，打开了保险，然后把它塞回腰带里。1点30分，我穿过马路，走进了黑暗的楼梯间。一堆纸箱角落里传来一群小猫的喵叫声。走廊里透进来的微弱光线照亮了台阶，形成模糊的暗影。扶栏很粘手，空气潮湿，弥漫着发霉和下水道的臭味。随着我悄悄爬上二楼楼梯，隐约传来人们低声交谈的声音。我探头从栏杆外望去，向上看。没有人站岗放哨。莫雷蒂觉得自己不值得老板费心派人保护。

source: From below , a man and woman started up the stairs , their slurred words and drunken laughter filtering up the stairwell ahead of them . Though they did n't sound like they 'd be a threat , I had nowhere to hide , and certainly no explanation for lurking on the steps . Hoping they 'd stop on the second floor , I sprawled out on the stairs and feigned sleep . In this building , drunks sleeping one off in the stairwell could n't be that unusual .
domestication: 在我下方，一个男人和女人开始爬楼梯，他们含糊不清的话语和醉酒后的笑声在他们前面通过楼梯间传了上来。尽管他们听起来似乎没有什么恶意，但我无处可躲，也没有合理的解释说明为什么我会潜伏在楼梯上。希望他们会在二楼停下来，我便直接躺在楼梯上，装作睡着了。在这栋楼里，醉鬼在楼梯间喝醉后睡一觉也不是什么稀罕事，应该不会引起别人注意吧。

source: As I thought , I massaged my dead right hand with my left , an unconscious habit I 'd picked up shortly after I left the hospital . I was n't sure if it was just a nervous tic or if , somewhere deep down , I thought if I massaged it enough , the pain would stop . I watched the fingers spread apart and then close halfway into a fist . A new wave of pain shot like lightning up my arm .

source: I looked up at the sky and mouthed , I 'm sorry , Wes . He was the best friend I could have ever had , repeatedly risking his life and finally giving it -- for me , a man who had disdained him for his homosexuality . I shook my head . I never deserved a friend like Wes , and now I despaired that I would ever be able to pay back even a fraction of what he had given me .
domestication: 我抬头望向天空，默默地说了一句对不起，韦斯。他是我最好的朋友，为了我这个曾经因为他的性取向而鄙视他的人，他一次又一次地冒着生命危险，最后甚至献出了自己的生命。我摇了摇头，我从来都不配拥有像韦斯这样的朋友，现在我已经失去他了，我绝望地想，我永远无法偿还他为我付出的那么多，只能是徒劳地遗憾。

source: The most glittering of the English boarders was Celia , who could often be heard on the telephone under the stairs , expressing disbelief : " Tell me you did n't . Are you completely barking mad , poppet ? He ca n't have . Not even the Caitfords are that stupid " She had once stopped Louisa on the landing and asked her if she happened to have seen a pink kid glove anywhere ; Louisa wished passionately that she could produce it , but she could n't , and Celia went on up the stairs .
domestication: 英语系的寄宿生中，最引人注目的是塞莉亚，她经常可以在楼梯下的电话旁听到，充满了怀疑的声音：“你不会真的做了吧？你这个傻瓜，简直疯了吧？他不可能会这么做的，即使是凯特福德家的人也不会那么愚蠢。” 有一次，她在楼梯口拦住路易莎，问她是否见过粉色的皮手套，路易莎非常希望自己能拿出来，但她确实找不到，塞莉亚便继续上了楼。
foreignization: 最引人注目的英格兰学生是塞莉亚，经常可以听到她在楼梯下面的电话里表达着她的怀疑：“告诉我你没有做过这样的事。你完全疯了吗，小甜心？他不可能这样做的。就连凯特福德家族也不至于如此愚蠢。”有一次，她在楼梯平台上拦住路易莎，问她是否在哪里见过一只粉色的儿童手套；路易莎极力希望自己能找到它，但是她找不到，塞莉亚继续走上楼梯。

Because she did n't know what she wanted , she was dreading the meal the way she dreaded obligatory Sundays at church with her mother , or the therapy sessions she 'd started recently But she packed a black dress and the only tube of lipstick she owned .
domestication: 她在监狱的工作结束后，就会去找克莱，在城市里某个被改造成二流酒吧的餐车上会面。一年前，她已经暂停了婚礼的计划，如今他想好好讨论一下未来，做出最终的决定。由于她自己也不清楚自己到底想要什么，所以她正如同害怕星期天必须和母亲一起去教堂，或者最近刚开始的治疗课程一样，害怕这顿饭。但是，她还是打包了黑色裙子和她唯一拥有的口红。

source: Lila drove her pickup past the barbed-wire fence line and the brick prison and down a dirt road toward the prison farmhouse . In recent years someone had tacked vinyl siding to the house . The facade was dented and yellowed by the dry dirt that rose from the road . Sorry-looking air-conditioning units sagged in the windows .
domestication: 莉拉驾驶着她的皮卡车开过铁丝网围栏和砖墙监狱，沿着一条土路向监狱的农舍驶去。近年来，有人给这栋房子贴上了乙烯基墙板，这让人觉得有点不伦不类。原本应该很好看的外墙现在已经凹陷并且被路面扬起的灰尘磨得发黄了。窗户里吊着几个状态很差的空调外机，看起来也十分可怜。整体来说，这个农舍给人的感觉相当灰暗和沮丧。

source: Lila pulled out of the prison gates , her body still humming with adrenaline . She did n't have enough time to go home before meeting Clay at the wine bar in town , so she pulled the truck over on the side of the road near the old Edgerton place . The road was empty and she could n't see anyone around , so she got out of the car and opened the passenger-side door , which faced the tree line . Lila stepped out of her boots and work pants and for a second , exposed the naked body she was still proud of . She slipped the black dress over her head , the soft fabric sliding down her back and falling into place .

source: As a type , if only at first glance , he was simply an honest fellow and an enthusiast . But life has a way of pinning labels on us . Life is crude . It forces us to define ourselves more narrowly . And that 's why at his research institute the aging Victor Sushkov came across as that familiar type we aU know from the ' 60s and ' 70s . He was , as everyone around used to joke , a " Champion of Human Rights , " running up and down the corridors . Once he 'd been a Komsomol stalwart . Once a trade union activist . And now he was this nice , spry , little old guy .
domestication: 他看起来只是个老实人，也是个热心人。但是生活有办法把标签贴在我们身上。生活很残酷，它迫使我们给自己贴上更具体的标签。所以在他的研究所里，年迈的维克托·苏什科夫（Victor Sushkov）显得很熟悉，就像我们从60、70年代就认识的那种人。他被周围的人开玩笑说成是“人权卫士”，整天跑东跑西。曾经他是共青团的骨干，曾经是工会活动家，现在他就是个好脾气、精神矍铄的老头儿。
foreignization: 作为一种类型，如果只是乍一看，他就是一个诚实的家伙和一个爱好者。但生活有办法给我们贴上标签。生活是粗糙的。它迫使我们更狭隘地定义自己。这就是为什么在他的研究机构中，年龄渐长的维克多·苏什科夫表现出我们都熟悉的那种类型，就像来自60年代和70年代一样。他是，正如周围每个人曾经开玩笑说的那样，一个“人权冠军”，在走廊里奔跑。曾经他是一个共青团的坚定拥护者。曾经是一个工会活动家。而现在他就是这个好，敏捷，的小老头。

source: And the playful " gifts " they gave one another ! The wills ! It really was a kind of passionate game . The intellectual sport of idle old men . This sophisticated ritual unfolded picturesquely : both Victors , immensely proud , would exchange " papers , " texts they had written themselves . From hand to hand , elegantly . With a witness , perhaps myself , these texts were read aloud . ( When you know you 'll five a hundred years , leaving a will is a great joy , no doubt . ) Out loud by a fire . With pleasure . With satisfaction . Repeating key words . Slippery legal terms . Convoluted sentences . All the jibberish of a notary 's office .
domestication: 他们之间那些充满玩味的“馈赠”！那些遗嘱！这确实是一种充满激情的游戏，属于无所事事的老人的智力运动。这种高雅的仪式以一种奇幻的方式展开：两个胜利者，极度自豪，会交换“文件”，他们自己写的文字。优雅地，从手到手。有一个见证人，也许是我，这些文字大声朗读。（当你知道自己会活一百年时，留下遗嘱确实是一种莫大的乐趣，不是吗？）在火边，大声地，以愉悦，以满足，反复念着关键词汇，滑溜的法律术语，绕口的句子，全都像公证处的胡言乱语一样。

source: However , Victor Sergeevich Sushkov , who was playfully tossing around his property , was n't risking anything at all . He knew he 'd outlive me - that was clear . And by a long shot at that . One of his grandfathers had lived exactly to one hundred , another even jumped across , hurdled , leaped over that strange psychological barrier ? 101 ! To say nothing of Victor 's ancient grandmothers , always bustling about . They were aficionados of a good meal . Pancakes . Pickles . Potatoes . If you stuff yourself on foods starting with ? you 'll live longer ! Having buried their husbands , the old grannies , of course , also died at some point . But they died not keeping count of their years at all . ( Excuse me ? reaching 105 . ) What good was counting ? What sense did it make , without husbands , for them to know or not know their number on a turned-off stopwatch ?
domestication: 不过，维克托·谢尔盖耶维奇·苏什科夫却不同，他虽然也在胡乱处理自己的财产，但他并没有冒任何风险。他知道自己会比我活得久，这是很明显的。而且会长命很多。他的一个祖父活到了100岁，另一个祖父甚至跳过了、跨过了、跃过了那道奇怪的心理障碍——101岁！更别提维克托的老祖母们了，她们总是忙个不停，喜欢美食。煎饼、泡菜、土豆……如果你吃足了这些以字母开头的食物，你就会长命百岁！老祖母们当然也会死去，不过她们从来都不在乎自己的年龄。（对不起？活到105岁才去世。）数年龄有什么意义呢？对于失去了丈夫的她们来说，知道或不知道自己的年龄，在时间停止的计时器上又有什么意义呢？
foreignization: 然而，维克托·谢尔盖耶维奇·苏什科夫（Victor Sergeevich Sushkov）只是在嬉戏地处理他的财产，并不冒着任何风险。他知道他会比我活得久——这很明显。并且会远远超过我。他的一个祖父活到了100岁，另一个甚至跳过、跨过、跃过那神奇的101岁心理屏障！更不用说维克托的古老祖母们，她们总是忙碌着。她们是美食的爱好者。煎饼。泡菜。土豆。如果你吃以字母“？”开头的食物，你会活得更长！埋葬了丈夫，这些老奶奶当然最终也死了。但她们死的时候根本没在数自己的年龄。（对不起？105岁。）数有什么用呢？对于没有丈夫的她们来说，知道或不知道自己在停止的手表上的数字有什么意义呢？

To say nothing of Victor 's ancient grandmothers , always bustling about . They were aficionados of a good meal . Pancakes . Pickles . Potatoes . If you stuff yourself on foods starting with ? you 'll live longer ! Having buried their husbands , the old grannies , of course , also died at some point . But they died not keeping count of their years at all . ( Excuse me ? reaching 105 . ) What good was counting ? What sense did it make , without husbands , for them to know or not know their number on a turned-off stopwatch ?

source: And then again there was this Vas-Vasilich . Also one of us . Also potentially long-lived . One of the old buzzards who came to fish with us . We were all friends in our youth . He , too , got strangely excited by the entrancing evening talks by the fire . And the air from the stream . And the booze .
domestication: 后来，又有了这个瓦西里奇，他也是我们的自己人，也可能长命百岁。他是那些跟我们一起钓鱼的老家伙之一，我们年轻的时候都很要好。他也会被篝火旁的晚间闲聊迷得神魂颠倒，还有溪流里的空气，还有酒。这些东西似乎能让他忘乎所以。

And then again there was this Vas-Vasilich . Also one of us . Also potentially long-lived . One of the old buzzards who came to fish with us . We were all friends in our youth . He , too , got strangely excited by the entrancing evening talks by the fire . And the air from the stream . And the booze .
然后又有这个瓦斯-瓦西里奇，他也是我们中的一员，也可能长寿。他是那些来和我们一起钓鱼的老家伙之一，我们年轻时都很友好。他也会被篝火旁吸引人的傍晚谈话激动得很奇怪。还有小溪里的空气，和酒。

source: In the morning there were those venerable fishermen 's tall tales - a pike got away - half a kilo of perch - a perch was already doing somersaults on the shore ... now it 's in the grass ! ? Why do n't you tie up his hands so he would n't show how big the perch was ? We walked to the stream to check the deep-water fishing rods . The stream was narrow and poUuted , typical for the Moscow area . StUl , Victor Sushkov had two perches . And Vas-VasUich had two . And I even had three , and what huge ones !
domestication: 早晨一群老渔民开始吹嘘他们的捕鱼故事——有条梭鱼跑掉了，有半公斤的鲈鱼——一条鲈鱼已经在岸上翻跟头了，现在跑到草丛里去了？！你为什么不把他的手绑起来，让他别再比划鲈鱼的大小了？我们走到小溪边去看看深水钓竿，溪水很窄，也很浑浊，典型的莫斯科地区的景象。然而，维克托·苏什科夫还是钓到了两条鲈鱼，瓦西里·瓦西里耶维奇也钓到了两条。而我居然钓到了三条，而且都很大！
foreignization: 清晨时分，大家围坐在一起分享着渔夫们宏伟的故事——有一条梭鱼跑掉了——半公斤的鲈鱼——鲈鱼已经在岸上翻跟头了，现在居然跑到草丛里了？！为什么不把他的手绑起来，这样他就不能够显现出鲈鱼有多大了。我们朝小溪走去，以便检查深水钓鱼竿，小溪狭窄且受到污染，这是莫斯科地区的典型特征。然而，维克多·苏什科夫仍然捕获了两条鲈鱼，瓦斯-瓦西里奇也捕获了两条。而我更是捕获了三条，真是巨大的！

最有可能的是，这是即兴的，一定的事情，是他灵魂中的一个闪烁点。一个幻想。最有可能的是，这是继续那场写美丽构造的文件的游戏？与未来调情的游戏。这个游戏总能吸引它的玩家。他坐下然后就完成了。不太清楚为什么。他匆忙地写完了。这就这样。

source: Some tried to exonerate the funeral director : " Hey , look , it was Friday , he was drunk , soaked to the g ? ls . But , certainly , he 's no monster . He 's a human being ! It was n't out of spite . " Nonetheless , it turned out difficult even to explain whether the pickled Techkin was too lazy to rake out each one separately . Had he made a mistake ? And how did he pull this off altogether ? How , having violated the strictest technology , did he mix up the remains ? Impossible !
domestication: 有人替殡仪馆的主任辩解：“喂，看看，那天是星期五，他喝醉了，浑身酒气。但是，当然，他不是什么怪物，他也是人！他不是存心作对。”然而，事实证明，即使解释一下 TECHIN 那个腌货是不是懒得一个个清理，也很困难。他犯了错误吗？他到底是怎么干的？他怎么能够违反最严格的规章制度，把那些遗骸搞混呢？这简直是不可能的！
foreignization: 有人试图为殡仪馆的负责人辩护：“嘿，看，已经是星期五了，他喝醉了，被雨淋得湿透。但是，当然，他不是个怪物。他是个人类！这并不是出于恶意。”尽管如此，竟然很难解释，腌制过的Techkin是否太懒惰而无法把每一个都单独清理出来。他犯了错误吗？他是如何做到这一点的？他如何违反最严格的技术，将尸体混在一起？不可能！

source: I tried to reassure the youngest one , telling him how wonderful that place was . What grass , what willows ! Yes , yes , what old , creaking willows hung there over the river . Pitiful and gnarled , they stood in total isolation . You bet they were bored . They creak ... those willows ... It 's possible the deceased Victor also had them in mind in his note . In his will . An inconsiderate one , to be sure .

source: MUCH LIKE ANY CLOSE RELATIONSHIP , the intimacy of a chamber ensemble requires open lines of communication . The added complexity is , however , being able to understand , give , and heed attenuated and nonverbal cues while performing . Invariably , any group wil ! develop a system for communicating with cues . " Most often it is the first violin that is responsible for this , although there are many moments when the music demands that one or more of the other players take that responsibility , " Juilliard String Quartet violisi Samuel Rhodes says . " There are more subtle ways of signaling than outright cueing .
domestication: 和任何亲密的关系一样，室内乐团之间也需要保持通畅的沟通。然而，这种沟通方式还需要在演奏过程中理解、给出和注意微妙的非语言暗示。毫无疑问，每个团体都会发展出自己的交流暗号系统。朱利亚德弦乐四重奏的小提琴手萨ミュエル·罗兹说：“通常情况下，第一小提琴手会承担这个责任，不过音乐有时也会要求其他演奏者在某些时候承担起这个责任。”他还说：“除了明确的暗示之外，还有更细腻的信号方式。”
foreignization: 与任何密切的关系一样，室内乐团的亲密关系需要开放的沟通渠道。然而，增加的复杂性在于，在演出时能够理解、给出和注意被削弱的和非语言暗示。毫无疑问，任何团体都会开发出一个通过暗示进行沟通的体系。“通常情况下，这是第一小提琴负责这一点，尽管音乐中有很多时刻要求其中一个或多个其他演奏者承担这一责任，”茱莉亚弦乐四重奏的小提琴手塞缪尔·罗兹说。“除了明显的提示外，还有更微妙的信号方式。”

MUCH LIKE ANY CLOSE RELATIONSHIP , the intimacy of a chamber ensemble requires open lines of communication . The added complexity is , however , being able to understand , give , and heed attenuated and nonverbal cues while performing . " Most often it is the first violin that is responsible for this , although there are many moments when the music demands that one or more of the other players take that responsibility , " Juilliard String Quartet violisi Samuel Rhodes says . " There are more subtle ways of signaling than outright cueing .

source: Cues are essential in helping to keep an ensemble together during performance , but catching them can sometimes be difficult . A nod or a shoulder raise - sometimes simply breathing is a cue . " Shaping notes , vibrato , a shift of posture are all cues , " violinist Karen Kirn of the Grammy Award-winning Parker Quartet says .
domestication: 在演出过程中，视觉提示对于保持乐团的整体效果至关重要，但有时捕捉这些提示可能会比较困难。一个点头，或者肩膀的轻微抬动，甚至只是呼吸，都是视觉提示。帕克弦乐四重奏乐团的小提琴手凯伦·科恩（Karen Kirn）表示：“音符的处理、颤音、姿势的变化等，都属于视觉提示。”
foreignization: 提示对于帮助团体在演出过程中保持统一至关重要，但有时捕捉提示会很困难。 点头或肩部抬起——有时仅仅是呼吸就是一个提示。格莱美奖得主帕克四重奏小组的演员凯伦·科恩说：“塑造音符、颤音、姿势的变化都是提示”。

source: This condo I 'm renting has a living room/study , a kitchenette/dining room , and up another flight a bedroom with a very fluorescent bathroom . There 's a small " loggia " off the living room that looks out over the back side of Perugia with its silent campanile . Xan approves of my having chosen Assisi , for the sake of Saint Francis and the animals . I have no idea who lives on the other side of my walls .
domestication: 我租的公寓有客厅和书房一体的房间，一个带小吃吧的厨房，还有上一层楼就是卧室，里面有个超亮的浴室。客厅边上有个小阳台，可以看到佩鲁贾后面的风景，还有钟楼在那里静静伫立。我的朋友赞同我选择阿西西，因为圣弗朗西斯和动物都爱这里。至于我旁边的邻居是谁，我一无所知。

source: I like to imagine my defunct marriage on Worldtime . The boundary moves back and forth in the disputed territory between Christopher and Alexandra . Matthew breaks off and federates with Vanessa Hu . Emma keeps forming shaky alliances with an Ethan or a Noah . I could provide sidebars , but where to start ? I 'd have to go back at least to my first birthday , the week we dropped the A bombs on Japan . I was a war baby , my father was still in the Pacific . There were only my mother and aunt and grandmother at home , my women . As soon as you 're born you start learning things .

I do n't stay long on any channel unless my favorite shows are on , which they are n't - Amy Sedaris , Tracy Ullman , Sarah Silverman , shows with nutty ladies . When I was a kid I watched " Our Miss Brooks , " " My Little Margie , " " I Married Joan " - I 'd like to see those old shows again to find out what used to make me laugh .
在床上我放松地使用遥控器看电视。我不会在任何一个频道停留太久，除非我喜欢的节目正在播放，这些节目是艾米·塞达里斯，特蕾西·乌尔曼，萨拉·西尔弗曼等那些有疯狂女士的节目。当我还是个孩子的时候，我会看“我们的布鲁克斯小姐”，“我的小玛吉”，“我嫁给了琼”——我想再看这些老节目，以便弄清楚以前是什么让我发笑。

source: I do n't think of Vi as my second daughter . I already have a perfect daughter . I 'm not missing anything , daughter or son . I think of Vi - no , I 'm talking to her : I think of you , Vi , as a grown woman . Did n't even thirty-six once seem old ? But what 's thirty-six in the world 's time ? We 're on this planet for however many more years . It 's a celestial second .
domestication: 我并不把Vi当成自己的另一个女儿，因为我已经有了一个很完美的女儿。我觉得自己的家庭很齐全，不缺儿子也不会少了女儿。对于Vi，我更是把她当成一个成熟的女性。三十六岁，在以前确实是一個比较大的年龄，但是在时间的长河中，這又算什么呢？我们在这个星球上能活的时间也就只有那么几十年，转瞬即逝，短得不能再短。
foreignization: 我并不把 Vi 当作我的第二个女儿，我已经有一个完美的女儿了。我没有缺少任何东西，不论是女儿还是儿子。我认为 Vi—— 不，我正在跟她说话：我把你，Vi，当作一个成年女人。三十六岁不是曾经显得很老吗？但是在世界的时间里，三十六岁又算什么呢？我们还会在这个星球上多活一些年，这只是一个天体上的瞬间。

source: In the dressing room , the composer takes off his shoes and socks . The smell is powerful . He has a theory about sweat . Another about photographers . Another about Germany . In fact , he has a theory about everything . He offers one now , in a voice loud enough that the photographer outside can hear : what point is there to a disagreement if you are n't willing to make a scene ?
domestication: 在化妆室里，这位作曲家脱掉鞋子和袜子，顿时一股难以言说的臭味弥漫了整个空间。他有一个关于汗水的理论，还有一个关于摄影师的理论，甚至对德国也有自己的一套看法。其实，他什么事情都有一套自己的理论。这会儿，他大声说道，让外面摄影师也能听得一清二楚：“如果你不愿意大闹一场，那么争论又有什么意义呢？”
foreignization: 在更衣室里，作曲家脱掉鞋子和袜子。这种气味很强烈。他对汗水有一种理论，对摄影师有一种理论，对德国也有一种理论。事实上，他对所有事情都有一种理论。他现在提供一个理论，大声到外面摄影师都能听到：如果你不愿意制造场面，那么有什么意义的争论呢？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In the dressing room , the composer takes off his shoes and socks . The smell is powerful . He has a theory about sweat . Another about photographers . Another about Germany . In fact , he has a theory about everything . He offers one now , in a voice loud enough that the photographer outside can hear : what point is there to a disagreement if you are n't willing to make a scene ?
